I live for leopard print! The first time I ordered this jacket Amazon had suggested that the large would fit me best, so I ordered up from my normal size medium. I assumed that maybe this piece ran small. Nope…it was WAY too big for me, and not in a cute, oversized way. So I returned it and ordered a medium. Still oversized, but it actually looked adorable. I think I definitely could’ve sized down and still had plenty of room to move around in. It’s meant to run a little large though, so if you’re looking for a snug fit then order a size (or two) down. Otherwise go with your regular size and you’re golden. One thing I noticed is that the print is clear and defined. Sometimes the images/prints on clothing are a bit blurry, but this one looks pretty pristine. The price point isn’t too hefty…especially for denim, and the material isn’t itchy or incredibly stiff. I wouldn’t suggest wearing it in cooler weather unless you really plan on layering up. I love that it can be styled in so many different ways…with jeans, leggings, skirts, trousers, tees, sweaters, dresses, button-ups, etc. I feel like the possibilities are endless. For reference I’m 5’3”, 152lbs, 36C and ordered a medium. The only reason for the 4 stars rather than 5 is because the first medium I received had a broken button.

I live in these pants. The only time I'm not wearing them is when they are being washed, summertime, and when loungewear is inappropriate. They are so fun too. My BF calls them my "balloon pants." I've worn them around the house and when traveling. And I get SO many compliments on them when I wear them out. They can actually be dressed up a bit if you can believe it. AND POCKETS!!! Get yourself a pair of birks and tie a v-neck t-shirt in a knot + messy bun = DUNZO. The pants are thick and seem like great quality for the price. The biggest downside is waiting for them to hang dry since it's not recommended you put them in the dryer. Though, I imagine if you did put them in the dryer they would shrink up a ton (cotton/linen does that), so don't do that. I got the gray color. It's has a tinge of blue to it, overall I'd call it a dusty blue color. I'm 5'2" 140 lbs and they drag a bit on me but not much. I could see these being pretty short on someone that is taller (over 5'5'). Get them, you'll love em!

I love a wide leg pant and these are cute. I am 5'5" and weigh approximately 150. I think I'm a pretty true size 12 and I ordered the large. The fit is true for me. My waist has not fully recovered from my last pregnancy and is thicker than what I'm used to, so there's a bit more snugness in the waist than I would prefer, but nothing unbearable. I consider these pants comfortable with the elastic give. I am not super leggy and this length is about perfect for me. I usually struggle with pants running under my heels in a regular length, and this length is absolutely perfect for me. So, if you are tall and leggy, plan on these being a cropped pant. Perhaps they were even meant to be a cropped pant, but they work as a full length for me. I would definitely order again.

I love the cut and style of these stretchy pants! I bought a size up due to the potential for shrinkage if someone else did the laundry. I also didn't want a "muffin top" created by a tight waist band. They fit great--and if they shrank--they'd still fit. They have a wide waist band with belt loops. Sit nicely at at the hip (I'm short waisted).All the pockets are fake, but nicely detailed. I am 5'4", weigh about 145-150, and I ordered a size 12. Yes, I could've ordered a 10 and feel confident they would fit even better, but I can't risk the potential for shrinkage and muffin top. They were long, but I just folded them under the exact width of the existing hem and hemmed them myself. I wash in cold water and hang dry. The ONLY drawback (but worth it in my opinion) is they do need to be ironed on LOW (synthetic). If it's not a low heat, you risk melting your pants. The back pockets look puckered after washing, but once you iron them and wear them, you don't see the puckers. Also, the pants stretch back into form, meaning they don't stretch out and look saggy. These pants are light weight, perfect for warm/hot climates. Very slimming. Who doesn't like that?

These hug my hips/butt nicely but are loose enough through the leg. I normally wear a 25, and I ordered both a 25 and 26 since a lot of the reviews say to size up. The 26 fit okay but we’re just a little too loose for my liking on my butt so I opted to keep the 25. They’re a little stiff so they crease a little funky in the front but I think they just need to be broken in and/or washed with a little softener. All in all I’m super happy with these.
I love these jeans. I’ve tried on so many pairs lately and these fit perfectly. I’m 5 foot 10 and weigh 170 pounds and bought an 8 long.

I love these leggings, I went with a size M and they fit perfectly. Im 5’3 and they were just a tiny bit long but after I put my tennis shoes, the length seemed just fine. Very comfortable as well and great compression on the belly!

I love these leggings! They are very soft and warm feeling. But, they are very thin, not the kind of thing you can wear on a cold day, but great for indoors. Also, because they are so thin, they aren’t very smoothing or flattering, they show all your bumps and lumps. However, I love how long they are; they have a nice high waist and go all the way down to my foot, even though I’m 5’10.

I love these leggings!! I’m 5’11 about 180lbs and got the size L and XL just to be safe the XL was way too big so I kept the L and they fit perfectly! Nice stretch and the inseam was surprisingly long id say about 35in inseam so I can wear these without my ankles showing!

I love these leggings. They are super soft and fleece lined (which is so comfortable). I am 5'2" and 117 lbs (29-30 inch waist) so I bought two pairs in large/xl based on my waist (shown in the photo attached) and I own a pair in small (which is what I originally purchased). Honestly, you would not see a difference in a photo of me wearing either the small or the large size. The large is a little longer in the legs and comes up above my bellybutton, but other than that I don't feel much of a difference. It definitely feels more comfortable pulling it up so it aligns with the top of my legs to look like jeans rather than tights (and I'm short!). I will likely purchase it again in the large size since there's not much of a difference to me in tightness. Although I could see this stretching to fit a heavier person, I wouldn't consider it xl sized. I usually wear small or medium in other stores, and I'd consider this more of a medium size.

I love these lounge pants! I'm currently 36 weeks pregnant, and with just 2 weeks to go until my C section, I've been living in these. I originally ordered 2 pairs, but I just ordered a 3rd because after my surgery I know I'll need loose pants that don't constrict my incision, and I have a feeling I'll only be wearing these at home for the first few weeks of recovery. I wear a size medium before and during pregnancy. I'm only 5' 3", so these do run a bit long on me. But I only wear them around the house with slippers so I don't mind one bit. With how loose fitting these are, I have no doubt I could wear a size small but I'm fine with them. They're loose enough that they don't constrict my waist, but I can also pull them about halfway up my preggo belly and they'll fit there comfortably, which I really need for after my C section. I wish I'd bought these for my first baby during my surgery recovery, and i highly recommend them before, during, and after having a baby even if you don't plan to have a C section. The weight I've gained during this pregnancy seems to be all baby, so I know I'll still fit comfortably in these after the baby comes. I may have to roll up the waist though. Highly recommend!

I love these medium wash baggy jeans! I usually wear a size 6 but opted for a size up to ensure the leg length fit, as I'm 5'9". The pants are slightly long without heels, but they fit well and provide the loose, comfortable fit I prefer. The jeans have pockets, and the material is top-notch—soft and durable. The stitching and hems are well-done, and I can tell these jeans will last a long time with proper care. I highly recommend them.

I love these overalls and get compliments each time I wear them! I love them casual or a little dressed up for a day out. Want to eventually grab the white ones too! I’m 5’7 and athletically built 130lbs and wear a small

I love these overalls!! I want to wear them all the time now. I am 5’8 145 pounds for reference and wear a size 4-6 in jeans. I ordered both a S and M and ended up going with the S. The M was too large around the hips for me. Also because I am tall I loosened the straps quite a bit since the inseam isn’t super long. That’s the only reason I gave it 4 stars but if you are a normal height it should be fine. Wore these on a road trip to Big Sur and they were comfy and stylish.

I love these pajamas! They are cute, cozy, and warm. I’m typically a women’s small (5’6” 130Ibs) but I like my pajamas a little loose so I ordered a medium and large. I ordered from the same seller and they even arrived in the same bag but they were made with different fabric and were wildly different in size. The large pants fit me like a glove and the top was loose but not overly so. I pulled the pants up because I like a high waisted fit and they still sit at my ankles. The fabric is stretchy and very plush. I was surprised they looked so similar to the stock photos. The buttons are on tight and there were only a few loose threads. I wish the arms were a little longer so the elastic could sit at my wrist instead of my arm but it’s still comfy. The inside of the pockets is a little scratchy and I’d prefer fabric covering the elastic on the ankle and wrist ruffles. Overall, the large pajamas were 5 stars. The medium pajama pants were too small to get on and too short. The top fit fine but the fabric on both is rougher, cheaper and less plush feeling. I would not have kept the medium even if they weren’t too small.

I got a size L and am 5’5” 160lbs and usually am a size 10 in pants. If they go on sale I’ll order more!
I love these pants BUT I’m 5’3” and these are high waters on me. At least 2” off the floor which I’m not a fan of. If you’re taller than 5’3” I’d size up or find another product.

I love these pants! They fit comfortably with good stretch They also wash up well. I’m 5’ and I wear them with a 3-4” heel. They are perfect! I have the pink and green. Can’t wait to order more.

I love these pants! At 5’5” and 220 it was hard to find cute jeans/pants in the “skinny” style. I needed something much more fitted at the ankle than my big girl jeans! Thought I’d give these a try and I’m glad I did! They are thick enough they don’t look like leggings, just nice enough to wear to work, and stretchy enough to be comfortable! I have now lost 30 lbs and I’m still wearing them! No need to buy every size as I’m losing weight. XL fit then and fits now. I might not have to buy again until I get into a medium!! Those reviewers whose pants split right away were likely wearing them waaay too small. If you’re on the fence, go for it!

I love these pants! They look high end not cheap at all. Flattering pull on, flat front style. Elastic back is perfect. Very well made. For ref I am 5’7” 129 lbs and all legs, and in a Large. These are actually long enough- yay! I ordered a L and M, and kept the large - they fit great. M was too tight in rear and thighs. Wore them to a wedding and needed just enough room to dance all night. The mat’l also has stretch! I added a belt but they’re nice without. Just be careful as satin can snag on jewelry. Great purchase!

I LOVE these pants! Enough to deserve a thoughtful review. That said, let's start with the fit! The pants are advertised as butt lifting. I cannot personally confirm this, as i do not have a problem in that area, but i CAN confirm that the pants almost contour to your body. There's no bunching or baggy spots. The stretch is enough to provide a perfect fit but not too much that they become loose. I love the rise - I'm a sucker for high waisted pants 😍 These come right up about up to your belly button (which is my favorite height for high waisted pants). Super cute rise! Just make sure to measure yourself properly with this type of rise - there isn't gonna be a lot of wiggle room. I know my measurements well but i also try to keep in mind that a lot of women dont so i just want to put that reminder. Measure your waist at your belly button. Measure your hips at your thickest part. As for the length: I'm a little short - not quite 5'3 - so the pants are a tad long on me. However, if you're average height or like me and always wear heels, this wont be a problem. Plus, they're easily rolled at the bottom if needed. Over all these are very cute, comfortable and everything i waned. Black skinny jeans are a staple for me so I think I will be ordering another pair. I got a lot of complements on these (usually you don't get compliments on plain black pants lol).

I love these pants! I am 5'3", 180lbs, midsize between 10-12 and got a large. They are a bit bigger and long for me but are perfect for some high heeled boots and a belt. The corduroy texture feels high quality and is super soft. These pants can easily be worn to the office or dressed up. They are perfect for fall!

I love these pants! I am 5’6” and about 130 pounds and ordered a medium. I wouldnt say I have long legs, but I do have a short torso. These are truly high waisted, breathable, and have plenty of give. They fit well but are not tight. The hem is raw. The shoes im wearing are platform and the pants do not touch the ground.

I love these pants! I am 5’9” about 165 and I ordered a large. I first has a medium and they were just a little too snug for a professional setting. I ordered the large and they are a little big in places but very comfortable. The back has an elastic waistband so you can’t wear a belt with it. That’s the only negative. Love these pants. Highly recommend.

I LOVE these pants! I am 5ft1 and 110 pounds. I ordered the size small and they fit perfectly. The material is so comfy and the quality is incredible for the price! I plan to buy more colors very soon!

I love these pants! I bought them last minute for a 70s party and was pleasantly surprised. They're soft and such a fun print. I'm 5'9 and 120lbs, the small worked for me. They could have been an inch or so longer but overall I'm happy with the purchase! ✌️

I love these pants! I have never found a pair of men's jeans that fit right. Most mainstream men's skinny jeans are too baggy or too stiff. And most non mainstream men's skinny jeans are overpriced and too cramped where it matters. But these are perfect! I love the length, the high waist (for extra room for your jonson), the stretchy-ness, the price, and the style! For reference I am 5'8", 130lbs, 28" waist, and I fit a size 5 perfectly. At first I bought the zipper fly pair and have worn them for a while. I wanted a second pair since they ended up becoming my favorite pair of jeans, so I decided to buy another. Except they only had the button fly jeans available. I am now a button fly guy. I like them a lot. They look better than zipper fly IMO. If there was one thing I would critique it would be the ability for the jeans to hold shape after a few days. Day one they fit perfectly, day two a little more lose but not bad, day three and you might need a belt, day four and they are for sure going to sag without a belt. Wash them up and they fit perfectly again. It's not that bad since four days and the pants should probably be washed anyway. I guess the last critique is that they attract a LOT of fur. If you have cats or dogs, beware! Buy some lint rollers.

I love these pants! I purchased the black pair and ordered the polka dot pair shortly after. For size reference, I’m 5’8”, 170 pounds, have a short torso and a large fits perfectly. I can wear flats with mine but I think that the pants are too short for me to wear heels. The black and polka dot styles can definitely be worn in an office environment but I don’t think the lighter colors would due to the lightweight fabric. I’m most likely going to order more; I love them. I washed them in cold water, gentle cycle, and hung to dry a few times and they are still looking good.

I love these pants! I will definitely be ordering more colors! Sooo comfortable and cute. I’m 5’1 and 132 lbs and the medium in a 29” inch length fit perfect. Can’t wait to get more. Great for work or even just every day life.

I love these pants! They are super cute and very comfortable. My only issue is sizing...I am 5'7" and 135-140lbs and wearing my true size small. They are slightly tight in the elastic waist. I wish they had an extra inch on the inseam so they graze the floor when wearing flats. They are about a half inch off the floor barefoot. If you are shorter than 5'7", they will be perfect! Otherwise, the material is NOT see through, I repeat, NOT see through!!! I am thrilled about that!! The material is a silk like blend and very flowy and comfortable. The tie waist is not detachable. There is a pleat at the front which looks nice and dresses these up without adding bulk. Overall, I love these. They are so soft and comfortable and look super chic! They will be perfect for an upcoming trip to Mexico. I MAY take them in to see if the seams can be let out a bit. If you're between sizes, I would go up but if you're taller than 5'7", you may want to skip these because of the length. But definitely recommend otherwise, especially for the price ($24 at time of review).

I love these pants! They are super flowy and the fabric isn’t too thick or too thin! I’m 5’6.5 and the length is perfect. However, I would size up. I washed and dried them and they did shrink a little!

I Love these pants! They’re great for hourglass shapes. I got a large (for reference my waist is 32-hips 46 - 5’5” - 175) they are flowy, not clingy, soft, and comfy. I love these pants!!! I ordered them for a trip to Amsterdam next month and I wanted pants other than jeans. I figured I'd give these a try because they seemed to get really great reviews and I found a pattern I love so why not give them a shot. When opened the package, the leg part looked a bit big and I thought they would look like Aladdin pants (LOL) but they don't seem so big when they're actually on. They're roomy but not too big and the material is light but comfy and soft-ish.I love how these come in a variety of prints/colors and are super easy to coordinate an outfit! I plan to wear these with a black tank or black tee and sandals (like I'm wearing in the photo) but I could totally see myself wearing a pair of flats or even heels to dress them up if I wanted to. I also think these would be comfy enough to wear all day while I'm sight-seeing, visiting museums, strolling around town, or going to a flea market.I typically dress in darker clothes but wanted something different, something funky for my trip to Amsterdam. I love bohemian, though I never thought I'd actually like these so much! It might be hard to tell in my photo but they are a perfect dark blue and black floral/mandala type pattern (the color is actually called "Mandala Blue"). The pattern looks exactly how I thought it would be (or is even better!) in person!For reference, I am 5'9" and about 180 pounds. The length of the pants is just right, a little above my ankles. Not too long and not too short even for a taller person. My only beef with these is that I think they look better high waisted however doing so gives me a little bit of camel toe which isn't ideal so I have to pull them down a bit more to my hips for them to be more comfortable (or maybe with a different tee or tank they could work better for me high waisted). I wish the waist part was a bit stretchier or longer, which is the only reason why I gave them 4 stars, but this is definitely not a deal breaker. I was more concerned about these being long enough for my liking and roomy in the leg/thigh area which they very much are.Aside from the high waisted fit thing (which is probably more on my body than the pants themselves), I am absolutely obsessed with these! I didn't expect to love them so much but I really do. They are effortless, super cute and versatile! I can't wait to wear these! I'm so glad I took a chance and tried something I might not have if it weren't for my trip. I will definitely be wearing these into the summer well after my trip to Europe! Thanks so much for a great item!Update: washed these once and I am noticing a few lines on these where the print has faded or the black bled through the fabric? Not sure whether I'm explaining right but they are definitely not wet spots from water as they're a straight line. I did not dry these in the dryer, I let them hang up to dry so I'm not sure why there is a blemish in the fabric. My OCD is killing me knowing these spots exist, but I don't think they would be noticeable to anyone else and I still love these pants.

I LOVE these pants. That may be an understatement. I am 5'5, 127lbs, and the mediums fit me nearly perfectly. I need to take in the waist line by just a tiiiiny bit for them to be perfect, but I also have a pretty defined hourglass figure (tiny waist, larger hips/butt), which is why I love wearing pants like these. I've spent years shopping worldwide for pants JUST like these, and these ones are among the most comfortable, durable, thick, and flattering that I've purchased. I have two pairs of the khaki and two of the black, and I'd like to buy more since I wear them daily, but... That's where my 4 stars instead of 5 come in. I've ordered from this company a few times, and the quality and color of the material is hit or miss and tends to change. My first pairs of khaki and black were thick, good-quality material, good and consistent color, but when I reordered another pair of khaki - this time in both medium and small to see if the small fit any differently - the fabric of the small was noticeably different. It was thinner and more yellow-toned than the medium pair I loved so much. I returned them. The mediums were fine; they were made of the same soft, thick linen my original pair had been made of, same soft khaki color, etc. A month later, I tried ordering another two. a medium pair of black and a medium pair of khaki, assuming the quality problem was perhaps linked to the small size only, but the mediums that just arrived are the color and quality I had returned before! In my photo, the pair on the left are the new pair that I'm returning. It's difficult to tell in a photo since you have to physically touch them to truly feel the difference, but it's absolutely noticeable in-person, so much so that I can't stand the feeling of them against my legs. The black was also the poorer-quality fabric. I decided to eat the cost and try washing them immediately to see if that helped, but even washed and air-dried, they're noticeably different quality from my first black pair I ordered two months ago. I'm disheartened - I want to buy so many of these so I never have to worry about ruining a pair, but I don't want to keep ordering and returning in hopes that the pair that arrives will be the quality and color I love so much. There's definitely a consistency problem, so be warned of that. If you end up receiving the better quality pants, you'll love them. I know I do.

Dealing with a chronic pain illness makes me want to wear comfortable clothes whenever possible. I'm often at home wearing pajamas, but for being out, these jeans are an awesome choice that mix comfort, fashion and efficiency. These jeans are perfect for just about any occasion, whether it be work, play, a date, or anything in between. They're rugged enough for hiking and soft enough for lounging. The fabric is very smooth and stretchy. The only problem is that the material easily attracts lots of fur and dust if you have pets that shed. These jeans aren't the most butt-lifting like most regular tight denim jeans are. They're also not as tight as jeggings although they're still skinny. But these jeans are still very flattering and form-fitting, and you can't beat the comfort level. I like these a lot! I think you will too.

I must say, I am very pleased I bought these magical mom jeans in black and medium wash. My waist is 25.5", 33.5" hips. I ordered size 3. They fit beautifully. I have smallish hips and a wider waist so I was worried that the waist band would be too tight. It is snug, but it does have some stretch, so I think as long as I don't gain weight around my waist, they should be comfy. I have only tried these on so far, I haven't actually worn them anywhere or washed them. They are soft and stretchy. I thought the black might be more crispy and less stretchy, but they are about the same. The fit on both pair was identical. The jeans really make the most of my small butt, and they make my waist look smaller, which gives the illusion of more of a heart-shape, when in reality, my waist to hip transition is pretty pretty straight. I can do a deep squat in these jeans without having to adjust them. In the pictures I am wearing them with panties that create lines. I don't want these to shrink, so I will probably wash in cold and hang dry. The fabric looks like it has good structure and is unlikely to stretch out or sag, but time will tell. I paid less than $30 each, which I think is a great price for what I received. Plus I ordered them day before yesterday and they arrived this morning. Can't beat that!

I needed a new denim jacket to fit my current size. I liked this darker wash color and classic look. It is important to measure your bust, waist, and hips to determine your size; don't go off the standard sizes you buy in the stores. I saw some reviews from women who also bought an XL and claimed it was too small; and although their weight was slightly less than mine, they were also much shorter than me. I am an athletic body type with broad shoulders, but still have womanly thickness. In the photos I have on a wireless bra, but I dont think a push up would fill in the chest area too much more (38/40 C). Your true measurements are the key. If you get your correct size, your abdomen will have a straight line silhouette (like in my photo), but if you want to show your curves, a size down may do the trick. If you are hoping to wear thicker shirts or sweaters with the jacket, I suggest sizing up one or two sizes, because the arms are a form fit. The denim is light weight (perfect for TX), but not thin (great for "fall" and "winter" we have in our state). It has enough stretch in the fabric that you can unbutton the sleeve cuffs and roll them up as I did in my photos. My hips are wide, so I can only button the bottom button and the jacket still look decent. But I only want to wear it open anyway. Overall, this is just what I wanted and I am very pleased! I'm excited for the weather to cool off some more so I can wear it. If I find issues with the stitching or quality, or have issues after a wash, I will update my review.

I ordered 1 pair of these to start and thought they were great! They fit true to size and felt very comfortable and stretchy (almost like a jeggings material/feel)! Although I don't normally wear jeans in the "long" length, I ordered it in these since the regular length was listed as an inch or so shorter than most regular length jeans. I am 5'5". The long length on the first pair seemed great. They were a little long, but I would rather that and make a small rolled cuff at the bottom than too short. Because I liked the first pair so much that I just got, I ordered 2 more. None of them are consistent. They are all made of different blends of material and have a different texture. The sizing and styles are not consistent. Each pair is a different length. The design on the back pockets of each is different. It does show this in the product photos, but I didn't expect the blends/textures and lengths to also be different. While each pair does fit (some longer than others), the fits do vary. The front pockets are also different. Two of the pairs have what I would consider "normal" front pockets for women's jeans. The 3rd pair has pockets less than 2 inches deep that they're basically pointless! I love the 1st pair I got but will likely send the other 2 back. Just don't expect them to be consistent.

I ordered a six long and was impressed by the quality of these jeans. Tried them on and was very happy with the length (I’m 5’8). Problem was that the waist was snug, like the actual waist band that you button. So I ordered a size up and tried again. There seemed to be more room in the hips and thighs, but the waist seems to be exactly the same! I guess my waist isn’t tiny enough to fit into these comfortably, but I would recommend them if they fit. They are very flattering otherwise and fit great for those of us who struggle with typical jeans that don’t allow for curves. I attached a picture with the size 8 in back and 6 in front.

I ordered a size 0 inseam 38 which is a rare find. These fit amazing. They were pretty tight when I first, but after wearing them for a couple hours they fit me perfectly. I cant tell you how long it's taken me to find a pair of jeans that don't come above my ankles when I sit down and im so happy I found them before winter, because I'm tired of cold ankles! The front pockets are really hard to get my hand into but I could care less because they first good! I have no butt and they still fit snug on my butt as well. Highly recommend these jeans and the price is epic!!!! I'll be buying more for sure

I ordered a size 13. I am about 5'9" @ 194 lbs. I usually wear size 14 bottoms. These pants fit very nicely and were very comfortable. I usually don't like to get pants with a 29" inseam. They're typically too short. These actually hit perfectly. I will take the measurements of my pair at another time (and hopefully remember to update my review with that info).I can dress them up or down. I have not yet worn them for a full day, but I'm sure I will not be worried about comfort. I've been dying to get a pair of leather pants for a little while now. I happened to catch these on sale. A good introductory price for a new piece for my wardrobe.

I ordered a size 4 for daughter, it fits her great and she loves it. The length is perfect on her, she’s 5’4” and weights 105 for size reference. Pant does have a chemical smell and hopefully goes away after washing. Jean is comfortable. The denim has a nice weight to them and seems great quality denim. Pockets are deep. Good pair of cargo jean.

I ordered a size 6, my usual size. I'd say true to size or slightly large. I'm 5'3.5" and 135-140lbs. It feels like they will stretch out easily. Fabric feels scratchy. They were really cheap but cute for the price. Not my favorite but I will wear them.

I ordered a size 7. I am 5'6 150 lbs. The pants fit as expected and are true to size. I was a little worried the pants would fit differently due to some of the reviews but all the pants are the same as you can see in the picture. Maybe they fixed that issue. I will be ordering more colors!

I ordered a size large in blue. Very soft comfortable jeans. I am 5’2 158 lbs curvy. I do think that for a more relaxed fit and not a snug fit, I should have size up. They are stretchy, I’m wearing boot so the length is just perfect. I still like them. Also the seem on the pocket will stick out if they fit snug on that area, does have deep pockets. I do like the fabric. Material is soft and stretchy. I would say it’s more of a light weight material.
I ordered a size large. Not really know what size jeans I wear anymore since I’ve gained weight, I’m 5’0 and 165 pounds. These for perfect, not much stretch in the waist but they look good.
I ordered a size medium I’m 5’5 148lbs and they fit good Good material
I ordered a size medium. I’m 5’3” 145 lbs. I love these jeggings! Supe flattering, comfortable and I love the color!! Will buy the black ones next!

user_comment: I ordered a size medium. I’m 5’3” 145 lbs. I love these jeggings! Supe flattering, comfortable and I love the color!! Will buy the black ones next!

user_comment: I ordered a size S which give me a flattering shape but still have some stretch (I would even consider going for an XS). I'm 5'2'' and about 130 lbs. I have shorter legs but these make me feel taller. The length is perfect, just touches the floor so I can wear with flats or heels. Great summer pants with a tank or t-shirt. These are my new traveling pants for the airplane!

I ordered a size smaller based on other reviews and I probably shouldn't have. They button but are tight. Hoping they stretch a bit as I wear them. The material is nice abd I love the color. I ordered them in a long as well and they hit my ankles (I'm 5'9" )

I ordered a size xl. I'm 5'3 and 160 lbs. I usually wear a size15-16 jeans. So I decided to give these jeans a try because of the coloring which is different than regular ones. And now they are my new favorite jeans. I have gotten nothing but compliments, and wows lol. The 1 thing that sold me on these jeans is definitely the coloring The 2 different colors are absolutely amazing. And I feel great in them.

I ordered a size XXL. I am 5'7", 215 lbs, with thighs and 33-34 waist. The color of the shorts are nice and of army 🪖 fatigue/camouflage. The material is light, denim and NO stretch. I will be returning them only because the leg 🦵🏽 part is too big and a little tight around my waist, but would be good with some good tummy control undies. I will be ordering a size XL to see if they will fit better.

I ordered a small due to some reviews mentioning the stretch in the pants. There was in fact enough stretch to fit around my size 4/6 lower body. I am around 5’6 and immediately felt how short they were at the bottom. With heels, I was able to wear them a couple of times before giving up on the length. The material is so comfortable and worth the price, but the length could be longer for the size. A medium may have been too loose. The button also is very loose to begin with. They ended up fitting my mom perfectly who is a size 4 and 5’4.

I ordered a Small PETITE in indigo. I am 5 feet tall and wear a size 4. I was hoping they would fit shorter, however they do hit at ankle. Pants fit loosely, I would say closer to a 6 in the waist (chart says 4-6) but because of drawstring in waistline they can be pulled in. My hip measurement from chart is between a size XS and S but because of the cotton/rayon content I was fearful of shrinkage and did not want them to fit tight as these are a more casual look. They did not shrink to a noticeable degree. Material is on the lighter side for pants, I would consider these better for warmer seasons. Very comfortable and soft to wear. I disagree with some reviews that say pants have stretch. There is no elastic in material, and I don't consider cotton/rayon to be stretchy. Front pockets fit my entire hand (or cell phone), however back pocket is shorter.

I ordered a small tall. The tag says small 4-6, 32 inseam. I’m 5’2 and wear a 32 inch inseam so If you’re buying these for a tall woman you should ask their inseam first. There’s no elastic in the waistband so they should remain comfortable. The belly portion is soft, smooth & stretchy. The rest of the pant is a loose fit with a wide leg. The fabric is soft and has plenty of stretch for movement. The pockets aren’t super deep but my phone does fit.
I ordered a small usually wear medium. I’m 5’2 143 lbs and I read the stretched a little after wearing them, so I sized down. Has an elastic waistband with a string to tighten if needed

I ordered a Small/Medium which fit well but the tag says one size so not sure if that means one size fits all? They fit well so I’m happy with my purchase but wondering if there are actually different sizes. For reference I wear a size 8/29 in jeans and am 150 lbs. Also the crotch stretches over to the sides so you can kind of feel it on your thighs or at least that is my experience. Still happy to have fleece lined leggings and they seem like they will be warm.

I ordered a two different sizes 8 short ( pictures are on this one) and a 10 short ( jo pictures), pants are very confortable, they are perfect long as well, they fit just right but im sure they will get bit lose later on the day, for reference im 4”11 weight 135 lbs, Im sure the 10 shorts woul be a bit lose than this one but still will fit perfect! Very pleased with the purchase and they arrived the next day I ordered them, I will be ordering another pair of 10 short

I ordered a two different sizes 8 short ( pictures are on this one) and a 10 short ( jo pictures), pants are very confortable, they are perfect long as well, they fit just right but im sure they will get bit lose later on the day, for reference im 4”11 weight 135 lbs, Im sure the 10 shorts woul be a bit lose than this one but still will fit perfect! Very pleased with the purchase and they arrived the next day I ordered them, I will be ordering another pair of 10 short

I ordered according to the chart and could have afforded to go down in size. But the pants are forgiving and still look good. I'm 5'9" and they are long enough. The fabric is of good quality and the pants can be dressed up.

i ordered an 8S and these pants cover my whole foot. i showed my right foot with the pants cuffed to show how much i would need taken off in order to not trip and die lol. for reference, i am 5’2 and roughly 145 lbs. the reason i bought these pants is because im a waitress and i would say other than the fact of it being too long on me they’re perfect. they’re stretchy, comfortable, and have a decent thick amount of material on them that they should not rip once so ever. they’re also super flattering! but just be warned that even though you’re buying a petite size it might not fit!

I ordered an S (smallest option) in light khaki. The color is spot on. The fit, unsurprisingly, is not suitable for my stature (5’1”).The legs are baggy throughout. Length, regardless how high or low I wear these trousers, are longer than I’d like. I may get these hemmed or not since I did not find them flattering especially the back view. Unless you aim for this look, go for it.Anyhow, the fabric is a medium weight. It’s versatile for year-round. The style also allows for a dressed-up or casual look. At 30 bucks, these pants are a lovely choice.

I ordered an XXL because they were out of the XL in black, so I thought they would need to be taken in, but they don’t! They definitely do run a little small considering an XXL fit me (usually a large or XL does well for me). They are very long and will need to be hemmed, but that was to be expected since I’m 4’11. Will be wearing these to see Harry Styles in a couple of weeks! They are very comfy and silk legging-like material :) Very pleased with my order!!

I ordered black in these overalls because I fully intend to work in my garden wearing them and thought black would hide stains much better than the lighter colors. What I didn’t expect was to love these overalls as much as I do. They are so cute I can work in them or wear them out. The jean material is thick and they feel and look well made. I am 5’7 and weigh 147 pounds for reference, and I ordered the medium. In my opinion, they are true to size. The legs have a little bit tighter of a fit at the ankle then regular work overalls. The Black in particular, is a darker black and not so much a faded black. I’m super happy with these overalls and can’t recommend them enough. I’d like to have the orange color as well.

I ordered black, I got blue. They’re still pretty cute but I hate the thin band inside the waistband. It just ruins the entire waistband. They also ride up with movement, shorter inseam than stated, until they get a bit damp from sweat. Speaking of sweat, these show it big time. There’s no hiding from it. These have potential but there’s too much no for me. I’m 29 waist, 38 hips and I ordered a medium.

I ordered both medium and large as I wanted a loose fit. I’ll be returning the large. Not much difference except longer crotch/inseam. I hoped these would be cropped like the pic and the FAQ said even for the short influencer they referenced. They are not on me. But I’m still liking them a lot. Would purchase again. I have a 27 inch inseam as reference.

I ordered both the dark and light. The darker ones I have on in the pic.....PERFECT! I’m 5’8 and 188 lbs. I have the dreaded cellulite and these shorts cover it all perfectly but aren’t so long that it makes you look “older” if that makes sense lol. Love them. The light pair was more snug and I didn’t care for the color. It’s lighter than pictured so I’m sending those back.

I ordered five dresses in three different colors and two different sizes. For a reference I am 5’ 3”, 125 pounds on the fluffier side since I’m in my 40s. First I bought two white dresses one small, one medium. The medium is a super soft material and runs big with NO pockets. So I ordered a small which is it different rougher material with almost no stretch and no give and has pockets. The small fit me find everywhere but around the arms it was a little tight when reaching or grabbing for something. The denim blue dress which I ordered in a small and medium were almost identical in size length and material. The medium was about a quarter of an inch wider than the small and that was the only difference that I found. So both ran super big on me. Lastly, I ordered the black denim dress. And it’s a small. It fit me perfectly! So I am sending both denim dresses back and trying to decide what to do about the white dress as I love the softness of one but it is too big.

I ordered it oversized, large, I’m 5’7 and 145lbs and loved the way it fit, soft denim and very stylish . I am 59 years old and I guess this jacket made me look young and hip because I had to show my DL on a recent girls trip. lol

I ordered my regular size and shockingly these fit! At first I thought they looked too small to fit me, but they actually fit well and we're not tight due to the moderate stretch in the fabric. The weight of the denim is much thicker and heavier than I like, but the jeans are actually pretty comfortable nonetheless. The length was too long at first, but after one wash in cold water and only partially tumble drying them, they did shrink to a perfect length! The waist still fit perfectly which is often my trouble spot of not being generous enough. The online size guide for my "regular" size even listed the waist measurement as several inches less than what is typical, but I ordered my "regular" size anyway and this pair of jeans fit very comfortably because of the generous stretch. I do not like tight clothing. I would go so far as to say those gals who are more petite or slimmer, should consider sizing down! I have a thick waist (5' 4" & 154 lbs) and my regular size (12) fit me very comfortably. This style is kind of cute for an occasional mix-up/change. If you are on the fence, I'd say give them a try. They seem very well made! Mine were sewn perfectly and no flaws in the denim. They washed, partially tumbled, and hung to finish drying great! I only experienced shrinkage in length.

I ordered size 4 regular in black. They're more like a 10 than a 4. I usually wear a 7 in Juniors jeans for reference. I weigh 129lbs, my hips are 40", waist 25" and they were pretty loose and baggy. Which could be great if that's the look you're going for. The material is nice and thick and they have back pockets.
I ordered size X/XL. I am 5'2 tall, weight 130 lbs. It fit me loosely perfect. Very soft and comfortable pants. I wear it everyday at home. Hiking, jogging, running.
I ordered small/medium for my 28" waist. It's perfect. It holds you in and can stretch to accommodate a larger waistline. Well made! Does not look or feel cheap. I got the black and white combo pack.

I ordered the “Blue” color version of these jeans in size 12 as recommended. I’m 5’2 & as you can see in my photos, the crotch area is baggy/big, as well as it’s a bit too tall for me. The photo in the advertisement is a much softer blue toned than what I received. The blue denim I received is not only darker but the acid wash effect is also harsh. I think the seller may have sent me the “N Blue” pants because the blue denim advertised, doesn’t have the acid wash design in the back. The placement & harshness of the acid design looks terrible as if someone diy’d it. The only positive thing I can say is that the denim material itself is soft which is comfortable for wear. Overall I’m not sure if this was false advertising or a clerical error of being sent the wrong item but I’ll be returning these pants. I’ve lost faith in opting for an exchange because who’s to say any of the jeans are the correct style/color of what’s advertised here. Not worth $40 gamble.

I ordered the 16 Plus, they came in and were a little on the snug side, but still fine. However, I am 5'8 and they were about 2 inches too long for me. In a 3 inch heel they were just above the ground. Normally my boot cuts with a little bit of clearance with shoes that are not that high. I am returning them. Took a pic of the tag I am guessing that the say the inseam is a 33? Well I would guess 34 min. (no information on the length in the description) The material was a bit thinner than I was expecting for Levi's but had a nice slight stretch, If it wasn't for the length I probably would of kept these.

I ordered the 5x. I’m 5”8, 250lbs, waist 47.5, thighs 27, glutes 50, inseam 30. I say this because the pants fit me like a comfortable glove, l was able to tighten the draw string some with a small amount of wiggle room. I hope this is for everyone choosing their respective sizes. I love them!😄

I ordered the 9, or “9 regular” like it says on the tag. These jeans would be great but they are too short. I am 5’6 with long legs and a shorter torso and they barely reach my ankle bone. If these came in long they would be perfect. They’re also not tight enough around the ankle. I like my skinny jeans SKINNY.

I ordered the black 6M. I’m 5’ 5” and 145-150lbs and 6 months post-second-baby. I’m currently wearing a size 8 or 10 jean. But for some crazy reason I ordered a 6 in these. *face palm* These were way too small for me. Had I ordered my real size I probably would be wearing them right now instead of returning them. So they are made to fit tight and suck you in - almost like compression leggings around the waist. So if you order the right size, these are probably a dream. I didn’t get photos of the ankles, but they are slim, but not TIGHT around the ankles. The material is stretchy but thick. They don’t have the feel or look of leggings. I thought they felt and looked more like black khakis instead of denim. I would say more about the rest of the fit, but it was all pretty bad because of my poor ordering. If I reorder in my size, I’ll update the review.

I ordered the Black D pants, straight legs cut, in black, size M. I'm 5'7 and 134 lbs and it's a perfect fit! 🤩👍 After trying the same kind of pants that were more like constrictive (second-skin tight) jeggings rather than real pants, it's a great feel! These are more flattering. I like the jean style, the pockets and the zipper (tried other faux leather pants with only button fermeture and didn't like it) I read in other comments that the material is noisy and I have to agree with that, BUT nothing that a little mineral oil rub cannot fix. Besides, I am sure it won't be so obvious at a party. I also appreciate the material looks, not latex shine looking. I chose the straight legs cut for it's versatility; it can be worn with high heels as well as tucked in boots without the bulk. I didn't notice any smell. A little pricey in my opinion for faux leather (even with a discount) but I had been wanting those pants for a long while so... 🤷🏽‍♀️ I finally gave in, and I don't regret it! 😁 Also, sorry the photos are not the best quality, I need a better phone!
I ordered the black full length jeggings, size small. Soft, stretchy, fit as expected. Me: 4’11”, 115lbs.

I ordered the bright green for the color. These are true unisex. I'm a 75 year old man. I could find essentially the same cargos marketed for men. Button and zipper on same side. The men's version don't come in good colors. I like these cause elastic in waist so don't need a belt. They come in my length 29". I don't need to alter. After I wore a few time: Very comfortable, my huge cell phone in wallet case will fit in the 4 front pockets, also good for glasses case. I like the buttons on the cargo pockets. I keep the inner one buttoned and my phone does not fall out. Much better than velcro. Don't use rear or calf pockets. No more fanny pack. After a few weeks I bought the camouflaged for working around the house. Don't want to stain the green. I do a lot of DIY. Sitting on the ground I appreciate the room in the seat and crotch. Sometimes my pants will get wet like washing cars with spray hose. That's when I discovered my key fob with house keys fit easily in the little zipper pocket. NOT JUST A ORNAMENTAL DECORATION Very functional. The pants do well in the wash. The green has not faded. Just shake them out when taken out of the dryer hot. Looks good for going to doctor or market. My wife irons the green if I going to wear them to church. Now I'm looking at the women's dress/business trousers. Their almost identical to the pleated suit pants I wore 30 years ago. Just looking for the right fabric. I would like tropical wool.
I ordered the Cody Blue in Medium. I am 5'4" and 128#. They have just enough stretch and so comfortable and soft. Love them. I think I'll buy some more in other colors.

I ordered the coffee color which isn’t dark at all - it is a very dilute light brown color, almost khaki. I’m 5’4” around 150lbs and bought size large, and I like the way they fit. They will shrink in the dryer though so be cognizant of that!

I ordered the D-light Blue and they don’t look the same as the picture and are more of an acid wash. They’re not bad I don’t mind them just wish they looked like what I ordered. They are super comfy though and fit great. For reference I am 5’6 and 225lbs with a mom tummy and ordered a XXL. Super stretchy.
I ordered the darkness blue but I really didn’t like the color that’s why it’s four stars. Otherwise the fit is great. I ordered a small. I am 5”3 145 pounds.

I ordered the GRAPENT Straight Leg Jeans for Women Trendy Pull On High Waisted Cropped Elastic Waist Stretchy Denim Pants Ankle Jeans in “gentle sea blue.” I’m loving the great quality and heavy duty denim of the ankle jeans. The fit is great- even better than some of my expensive, zipperer-fly jeans! For elasticized waist with the faux zipper I’m very impressed at the great fit, feel and look of these jeans. I ordered large and they fit my 160lb, 5’6 body & inseam like they’d been tailored for me explicitly! I got the light blue with the whitewash bcuz I felt it gave summertime vibes being so light blue. These are form fitting, straight legged which I really like bcuz you have some versatility in cuffing the ankles and wearing a capri look rather than strictly always jeans. I did notice a mildew smell when I opened the package… going to wash them and if it doesn’t go away I will note to my review. I love them!

I ordered the green or olive as it’s listed but instead got what appears to be brown. I have yet to decide if I am going to keep them and am hesitant to even try another color if they are depicted so poorly. The packaging doesn’t even list a color so I am not even sure if this was human error or if they truly are suppose to be this brown. The pant itself is true to size, comfortable and the perfect length for my 5’6” frame.

I ordered the Icelandic Blue in size 10. I'm 5'9" and 165lbs. These are much, much shorter than what they show on the model. I'd say a good 2-2.5 inches shorter. The color is actually more like a typical denim blue, not light like is depicted in the image. My picture shows these "Icelandic Blue" versus another light pair of denim I own. I'm very disappointed because my sister has but in a size 12 and they come to just above her ankle.

I ordered the L/XL and freaking love them! I'm almost 5'11 and 180 pounds; not only are they super comfy in the waist, but they are long enough to reach my ankles, even after being washed and machine dried. The fleece on the inside is very soft. I am crossing my fingers these hold up after several washings and if so, I will be buying plenty more!

I ordered the lighter blue denim dress. I usually wear it as a jacket dress. It can be worn with short or long sleeves so it extends the seasons it can be worn. It is a good denim weight so it might be a little warm for hot summer days. I am 5'4", 138# and ordered a medium. That seems to be the correct size. Quality fabric and quality sewing. I'd order this again in a heartbeat.

I ordered the Lookbook Denim Jeans for Women in Pecan Brown Size XXL. To start, these are not high waisted pants. They are hip huggers, meaning they sit low on your waist and will not restrict your tummy if you have a few extra pounds. Furthermore, they state they jeans are stretch. They have a slight stretch to them, but they are not what is normally considered a stretch pant. Finally, these are not baggy on the average girl. They are boot cut/flare leg, but not baggy.With all of that said, I am 5 foot, 5 inches tall, 275 pounds, wear an 18/20 USA size and a 2x/3x top. My waist measurement at belly button level is 46 inches. My upper thighs and calves are thicker than most. I was concerned these pants would not fit, however, the Lookbook Denim Jeans for Women in Pecan Brown Size XXL fit comfortably. I will say there is a bit of tightness in the knee area, but I tend to have this issue due to my thick legs. I am not use to a hip hugger pant, so was genuinely surprised that these pants fit tight, but comfortably, as they sit under my "jelly roll", so there is none of that constrictive feeling on your stomach. I also like my pants longer and I found these to fit perfectly, touching the ground, giving them room to shrink a bit.Overall, the Lookbook Denim Jeans for Women in Pecan Brown in Size XXL are well made, the denim is thicker than most and I absolutely love the color. The fit is surprisingly good and the hip hugger style makes them extremely comfortable. So if you are a curvy girl like me, check these out. Five stars.

I ordered the Medium. I’m 5,3”. 140lbs. Size 8. These shorts are so comfortable and decent quality. They are super stretchy. They met my expectations!

I ordered the navy blue pinstripe pants in the size 4 which normally would be a super baggy fit on me. That is not the case with these, the waist seems to be pretty tight although it does have elastic in the back. They fit, but I was expecting a super baggy pair so I would say definitely size up. I’m 5’7 and these are a tad short on me. I prefer a little longer pants so I can wear heels with it. I will have to wear flats with these. But the pants are cute pants. I love the pinstripe design, they’re not see-through and they are quite comfortable and don’t seem to wrinkle easily. The fabric is mediocre so I think the price point is a bit high. Overall, not a bad pair of pants just definitely not for someone who is extremely tall. They probably would be way too short on them and make sure you size up.

I ordered the Olive green color! They do seem a bit darker than the photo which is sad bc I was hoping for a lighter green, but they are still cute. I ordered a large because some reviews said they shrink in the wash so I sized up and they are a good length, good fit. They are a lighter fabric rather than heavy. For size reference: I ordered large and I am 155 lbs and I am 5’8” Update: they were a little too big so I decided to wash and dry them and now they feel perfect! Not too short! And a little less loose on my legs and waist

I ordered the ones with side pockets and rear pockets. I’m 5’8” tall 125lbs and size small 33” was perfect. 35” inseam (red ones) were too long and the red color was too orangy. I wish they had more color options in the compression side pocket ones. Some reviewers complained about the elastic waist band but I actually like it. It helps them feel secure.

I ordered the ones with side pockets and rear pockets. I’m 5’8” tall 125lbs and size small 33” was perfect. 35” inseam (red ones) were too long and the red color was too orangy. I wish they had more color options in the compression side pocket ones. Some reviewers complained about the elastic waist band but I actually like it. It helps them feel secure.

I ordered the pink size XXL. Im 5' 8" size 18. I consider the color almost a neutral, I love it. Im super high waisted with long legs, apple shaped and these pants are flattering, long and fit slightly loose, which is great as they are 97% cotton a will probably shrink a tad. Good pants for spring/summer. Im very happy with this purchase.

I ordered the recommended size, and it is a lil big in the waist but not so much that it won’t work. It helps them be more comfortable and allows room for a short to be tucked in. The length was great. I am 5’8 and got a 6 regular
I ordered the red and white ones,,size 2x ..I'm 5'4 220 and the fit like a glove..I love these..I just ordered them n black

I ordered the S/M and the L since I'm between a M/L in leggings and don't like a waistband that's too binding. Oddly, when I opened the packaging, they looked exactly the same! I placed one on top of the other, and the rise, inseam, waist, hip, and ankle are identical (see photos of them stacked one on top of the other). I'm pretty sure these are one-size leggings that they've slapped two sizing tags onto because "one-size leggings" sound too good to be true. That said, the L fits me (31" waist, 40" hip) and I had my XXS daughter try on the S/M and they fit her 22" waist without gapping, so there's some magical stretchiness happening here. Length-wise, we're both 5'2" so there's a bit of extra length at the ankle but we can hike them up so it doesn't pool. Pros: - Sturdy exterior that looks like it will hold up to washing, soft fleecy interior (this must be the "velvet" they're referring to as they're NOT velvet on the outside, a bit like a teddy bear on the inside though), very comfy - Not so thick that it makes my legs look bulky, though there's a bit of puffy folding behind my knees and under the bum - Wore outside for an hour at 36F and I can feel the breeze through them but stayed warm - The waist band stays up; no muffin top Cons: - The front and back are identical, so there's not much room for a booty—i.e. the back side takes some coaxing to come up to mid-rise on me, though the front is easily high rise. No issue riding down throughout the day though. - They're oddly jogger-like at the ankle. More pronounced on my daughter since she has skinnier ankles. I tucked the extra fabric into my boot socks, but it's a little odd-looking with exposed ankles. Great for the $13 sale price and we're keeping both pairs.

I ordered the short size 12 and they are good but not the ideal jegging for me but still worth keeping. I have taken two photos with two different shirts and you can see that with the loose shirt, it camouflages my waist area. With the tighter shirt, it created an unflattering fit to see my fat bulging from the tight waistband. Ideally a looser band would be preferred, but I have a difficult body to fit jeans and pants since I am 5’3” and I have more of a “gut” than butt. So to get pants to fit in the butt, I have to order a size down but then it creates a tight waist and sometimes a muffin top and this is exactly what these jeggings did for me. But other than that, the length is great, the material nice and stretchy while still looking like jeans, they are comfy, and the waist band is still comfortable, despite the muffin top effect. I think I’m going to keep and just wear with looser shirts.

I ordered the SM/M option and the pants that came are all “S” on the tag and fit on the small side of small. They would never fit someone over 5’4” regardless of weight. Super disappointed bc it’s not what I ordered!

I ordered the small due to length, after ordering the medium the first time. I’m 5’3” and 128 pounds (ish) -the elastic waist has give and provides comfort. I love the pleats/overlay that add flare and a high level of luxury look to the pants.

I ordered the small in petite and thought it would fit perfectly as I am 5', between 120-125 lbs. My waist measurement is more want is stated in their chart, but I feel the waist ran a bit big or sat too high that I had to fold fold down the waist. The pant itself however, is comfortable and soft with fleece lining the inside. The pants is well made, the waist band wide, thick and sewn on the edges preventing it from folding/rolling while wearing

I ordered the small in the short length and they fit perfectly. I am 5’ and weigh 125. These pants are lightweight, soft with slight tummy control. Washed well, no shrinkage, I dry everything on low. Definitely plan to order a couple more pair.

I ordered the small in the short length and they fit perfectly. I am 5’ and weigh 125. These pants are lightweight, soft with slight tummy control. Washed well, no shrinkage, I dry everything on low. Definitely plan to order a couple more pair.

I ordered the The Drop Women's Standard Nancy Pleat Front Wide Leg Trouser to wear to work. I love the navy color with the white pinstripes. These are a nice trouser to wear to the office. The material is heavyweight and great for cold weather. The zipper and closures all work well without any defects. The front pockets are a good size, while the back pockets are just for the look. The legs are really wide and the length was good for my 5'7" height as they did not drag on the ground. The only issue I had with these pants is the waist seems to run a bit small. I normally wear an XL and these were slightly uncomfortable to wear to work. There is some elastic at the back, but I intend to move the clasp a bit to make them more comfortable. If you are between sizes, I recommend sizing up. They are pricey when compared to similar products as I am not familiar with this brand.

I ordered the XXL and was sent 4XL. But I'm glad, because after trying them on, I don't think the XXL would have fit. The 4XL clings but isn't tight which is what I wanted. Upon going back to the product images, I'm kind of wondering how those size models fit into these? I'm 5'3'' 195lbs and I have a pear shape. Measurements hips: 48.9 inches. Waist: 40.9 inches. While taking a picture for review, I noticed a rip on a seam near the hip.. It seems the fabric is doubled so it's not actually a hole. I think I'll just fabric glue it shut and call it a day. UPDATE: I've had these leggings for several months now and they're my go to because of the pocket, high waist and comfortable fit. I just wore them to my trip to NYC and it was wild. While trying to navigate to my seat on the bus as it's moving and being tossed around; the stuff in my pocket got seriously caught on the seat handles not once, not twice, but THREE times and it yanked SO hard I swore my pants were done for! To my surprise I look down and they look absolutely untouched! Still completely in tact! That day I swore I had to update my review and express how sturdy and good quality these are! For that price, what a steal. I'm so happy with these! Get them!! I just ordered 2 more pairs. :D

I ordered these & LOVE THEM! My first pair of pants like this! I ordered 2 more colors as well! They are dressy casual which is what I’m looking for for the warmer months. I’m 5’7 & I ordered a medium & that fit great- not too tight or too big!

I ordered these ANRABESS Women Wide Leg Baggy Cargo Sweatpants in a size Small for my 10 year old daughter and she loves the way they fit! For reference, she's 5' tall and 105lbs-ish with a 26" waist. Though these pants are a little long on her, she insists that is fashion... and I'm here for it! Here's what we like about these sweatpants: •QUALITY GARMENT: These sweats are well made. The stitching is straight and secure. They feel more like a higher end pair of sweatpants than fast fashion. •SOFT: These sweatpants are made of very soft, cozy material. While they are warm, they aren't extremely thick or heavily lined with fleece. •FASHION FORWARD: The actual cut of these pants is really nice! They are very baggy in the legs, specifically at the knees. But they taper up at the waist, giving them a really good shape. My daughter loves the cargo pockets on the sides. •WASH & WEAR! These pants can be washed, dried, and worn dozens of times without compromising the quality. Mom win! Overall, my daughter is just obsessed with these! She likes to wear them with tank tops and a bunch of accessories (not shown in the picture, but she was just lounging). She also wears them with graphic tees and athletic shoes. I just like that they are affordable, comfortable ad made well. We highly recommend them!

I ordered these as a loose-fitting pair of jeans so I could wear to work comfortably. They fit the bill. They’re nice and loose in the thighs. The waist is a bit too big, but I usually wear a 0-2 so I expected this, I just need to wear a belt. Otherwise these are very comfy and I like the fit. They’re definitely a denim material, not a jegging- which I like. The rise comes to a little under my navel. They hold their fit throughout the day and don’t loosen up. I’m only 5’3 and they’re still a little long, even with the short length but not too bad. Overall, great for the price.

I ordered these as I needed more warm clothing for the weather change. I’m 5’6 and my measurements are 37-31-44. The large fit. I love how warm they are. The fleece material inside is soft and not itchy. The pockets are perfect and deep enough to hold a cell phone and car keys. The product is advertised as high waisted, but they did not fit high waisted on me. The material itself is thick and of good quality, so they will keep you warm. My only complaint is the price as this is kind of pricey for basic sweatpants. When I say basic, I mean appearance and design. My other issue is that the pants shed a lot on the inside. Hopefully after washing them a few times, the lint will stop coming off on the inside. Overall, I’m happy with the item.
I ordered these as part of an alien Halloween costume and I was super impressed with the quality and look! Fit is as expected but a little short. I am 5'5" and 120 lbs and ordered a small.

I ordered these as work pants because I wanted something not as form-fitting as my leggings, but still stretchy and soft. I always get a little nervous with different pants because I have sensitive skin (might be a sensory thing idk) and some material feels like little pinches on my legs all day and is unbearable. Anyway, while I do get the little pinchy sensation here and there, it's very tolerable and I love these pants! They're stretchy, soft, easy to walk in, and I love how they're fitted from the top and down my legs but loose at the ankle! I'm between a 14/16 and ordered XL and they're totally perfect. I will say though, I'm 5'6" and they stop slightly before my ankle bone, which I like, but thought it was worth mentioning. I'm ordering another pair but in navy! I HIGHLY recommend, even for the girlies with sensory issues😉

I ordered these because I needed a black work pant and I am so glad I did! I am between a 31 and a 30 size wise, and ordered the 31. They fit PERFECTLY but there is no waistband stretch so if you are comfortably a size 31, then order a size 32. I loved the fit, the cut, and the pant length. Also, it goes up right to my belly button, so this is ideal for a business appropriate pant and can accommodate tucking in a blouse. See (unflattering) pictures for front and side perspectives. These hit right at my ankles (for reference, I am 5'8) so I didn't feel like they were high waters like the other pair of dockers I've owned. Material is soft and smooth. 98% cotton, 2% elastane based on the tag. Value on these? Awesome! They retail for $58 and the price was $39 on Amazon.

I ordered these because I’ve got about 10 pairs of Libin’s cargo joggers, which I love, and these palazzos looked fun. (For reference, I’m 5’2”, 36 inches at the waist, 41” bum). After trying them on here’s my impression: PROS: 1. 100% polyester, so they won’t shrink. The outside is a textured waffle weave that is 100% breathable, but the inside is smooth and soft. 2. SIzing is Spot on. I went by both my usual Libin size (XL) and their sizing chart (36 in waist), and super happy I did. These don’t pinch at the waist, but the top part of the pants aren’t excessively baggy. 3. Versatile and cute. I was just going to try them on this morning, thinking that they’d be great for church, but then I ended up wearing them on today’s errands. Considerations: 1. These are Palazzo pants, meaning there’s a lot of material in the leg. If you’re like me (a bit chunky, significant bum) you’ll want to wear these with a fitted top, to maintain a feminine silhouette. 2. The 27 inch inseam just works on my 5”2” frame (but I have a short waist and long legs for my height). Shoes keep them just off the ground. Anyway, I’m a fan.

I ordered these because of the great reviews but honestly planned to have to return them. I am 50 years old (5'5" and 150 lbs) and figured they'd only look great on a younger woman. I love the style, fit, comfort, and material. They are not see- through. Giving four stars because I feel they could have better tummy control. They are a perfect rise, but provide no control.

I ordered these because they were the only burnt orange color I could find to match my fall sweatshirt, but it matches perfectly! They are warm and very soft and you can't see through them. The only downsides are the price, they are a little long (I'm 5'3") and looser around the ankles then I like and the piling of fabric after only one wear.

I ordered these because they're my favorite color, purpley-pink-orchid. They're fantastic. Lightweight. The wrinkles steamed out easily. Big pockets ftw! I'll probably order another color too, I like them so much! I ordered XL according to the size chart. For reference I'm about size 10/12, 5'8", 175lb, 38B.

I ordered these black stretchy work pants in 14short since I'm 5'4" so I tend to need pants on the shorter side. Even though I ordered the short version, I still find I have to roll the cuff of the pants under once to give me a clean look, otherwise the pants look baggy on me- I included a photo with one pant leg cuffed and one pant leg as is. My hips measure 45" with a 34" waist, so according to the size chart I was taking a chance on my normal size 14, but aside from being a bit too long, these pants fit me like a glove. Love that the pants have an actual zipper and strong hold button closure, plus real belt loops. The butt has two fake pockets and the front has two real pockets but they're small. I appreciate how these pants are actually high waisted. The material is stretchy, comfortable, and moves with my body.

I ordered these capris in white and in “Sedona,” and they fit differently. First, I currently weigh 160 lbs and waist and hip dimensions are 34” and 40” respectively. I am wearing a size 14 in all photos. The “Sedona” denim had bizarre extra fabric in the rise as well as the hip areas. See how the rise puckers up into extra layers beneath my waist in the photos showing me sitting down? SO not flattering! The extra hip fabric is visible in the photos of me standing. (BTW, same shade of capris, but sitting down pics had a lot of natural light and standing photos had barely any natural light.) Anyway, maybe I just have funky measurements, but my “Sedona” capris puckered out on both sides of the hip region. I now seem to recall having the same issue with Lee’s Easy Rider jeans. For whatever reason, I don’t see the same extra fabric in the white capris; those are keepers. Hope this review and photos are to someone!

I ordered these Dokotoo Women’s Casual Mid Waist cargo jeans for my daughter and she loved it. Cargo jeans are sewn with high quality and neatly. The seams are even throughout and the threads do not stick out anywhere. The inner seams are carefully finished. The fabric from which the jeans are sewn stretches well and is pleasant to the touch. Cargo jeans look good and complement the look nicely. Cargo jeans have a beautiful gray color. I ordered a size 12 for my daughter and it fit well. My daughter was deciding between 10 and 12 and chose 12 because she doesn't like jeans that are too tight. The daughter is 5.3" tall and weighs 140 lbs. Her hips are 41.5 inches and her waist is 32 inches. There is a size chart in the description, which is very convenient. The cargo jeans are a bit long for her height, but this can be easily fixed with iron-on adhesive tape.

I ordered these dressy looking trousers for my granddaughter who I figured would appreciate a nice pair of trousers or pants designed for a taller frame such as she has. It looks like Tall MobPlace did a nice job with these. She notes "The polyester fabric should be durable and easy to care for, unfortunately, the white pants are rather see-through and you can very clearly see where the pockets were put in. The material looks classy and the fit is good. They are very comfortable for fit and easy to get on. They hug the waist and hips and they’re definitely very long and probably will be worn with heels - otherwise they will need to be hemmed up shorter." We considered that since she is an excellent seamstress and could quite easily do that, however the following day she was able to wear them with some 3" heels which she has. I hadn't anticipated that at 5'11" she would have those in her closet but I was obviously out of the loop. It looks like the 34" inseam will be about right with 3” heels. If we had ordered the 32” inseam they would be worn with short heels or flats to fit her correctly. As her grandfather I suggested: "I guess you can just wear the heels and look for tall guys that match up to your higher views and expectations in life."When ordering: Just realize that when they list as a 34" length, that is what they will be. The trousers in all other respects fit and feel real well.
