I ordered these for my niece. She is 5 months pregnant. She said she loves these pants because they’re soft and comfortable. She has room for her belly to grow. She is 5’7” so I ordered the large/ tall. They fit perfectly!

I ordered these in 26 because I wanted a looser fit, they sent me the 25 and I'm glad because they run a bit big and the waist has a gap. I normally wear 24 or 25 in Levi's so I'm hoping a few good runs through the dryer will shrink them a little bit. Other than that, these jeans are freaking awesome!! The waist hits right at my belly button. They are a 26" inseam and are a "cropped" style, but I'm 4'11 and they fit me like regular pants which I expected. The bleached out spots are really subtle and give the jeans a nice worn in look. They have that classic 501 fit and make your butt look great!

I ordered these in 26 because I wanted a looser fit, they sent me the 25 and I'm glad because they run a bit big and the waist has a gap. I normally wear 24 or 25 in Levi's so I'm hoping a few good runs through the dryer will shrink them a little bit. Other than that, these jeans are freaking awesome!! The waist hits right at my belly button. They are a 26" inseam and are a "cropped" style, but I'm 4'11 and they fit me like regular pants which I expected. The bleached out spots are really subtle and give the jeans a nice worn in look. They have that classic 501 fit and make your butt look great!

I ordered these in 33x33. I'm 5'7.5" and weigh 150-155. They fit perfectly! They are just a touch long but I prefer my jeans to fit that way. I typically wear a size XL in Juniors or a size L in Women's. I hope this review helps. I plan to order another pair of these as they will definitely be a regular wear for me.

I ordered these in a 27, I normally wear a 28 but they have a lot of stretch so I wanted them a little tighter. Sizing down was perfect for me, but does leave a little love handle action on the sides (I have a soft mom midsection) that would be noticeable with a cropped top. I ordered regular even though I’m 5’3 - so they are a little long but work perfect with a platform sneaker or heal. Love them!

I ordered these in a medium (Amazon suggested a small). I'm 5'4" and weigh around 140 lbs. They are fitted in the butt and slightly loose everywhere else. I could probably size down but I mainly ordered these to wear to work so didn't want them too tight. They have a ton of stretch and are super comfortable. They definitely can pass for casual slacks when paired with a nice top. I will definitely but more in other colors. Love these pants!

I ordered these in a size M and they are generally true to size. I'm 5'6", 28" waist, and a typical size 6/8 for reference. These looked like a very cute wide leg jean from the description pictures but the pocket inner lining can be seen from the front and it adds bulkiness around the top of the thigh where the pocket ends. Wish they would have made the pocket lining shorter and the pockets not so deep (you can see this in the picture). To be able to use these, I pushed the pocket liner up towards my waist and it isn't as apparent, but not perfect. These are a lightweight denim material, with a functioning drawstring waist and a wide leg opening. Overall, the jeans are truly high waisted, a good length, and a cute style!

I ordered these in my usual size 4 (27 waist) and while the high rise is really cute, the wide leg is too revealing for my 39 year old self. I feel like my cheeks are completely exposed. Normally a 3 inch inseam works well for my height and comfort level, but the leg holes flare out in a way that I can feel the air on my butt, and it's just not cute. Maybe for someone younger who wants everyone to see their goods, these would be a good option. I may wear them as a swim suit cover.

I ordered these in size small, which according to the tag is US size 0. I’m usually a size 2. These have an elastic waist band on the back so it fits me fine. My issue is the length. I’m 5’4” and these are short when worn with heels. It looks a little awkward. It looks better with flats or sneakers (90s style). Problem is I like wearing pants with heels instead of sneakers. They are cute, but not the best. I like the color I got. This taupe color can be be paired with many colors. I wish they were a little longer, they would have gotten 5 stars. I think they are a little pricey for the quality.

I ordered these in size small, which according to the tag is US size 0. I’m usually a size 2. These have an elastic waist band on the back so it fits me fine. My issue is the length. I’m 5’4” and these are short when worn with heels. It looks a little awkward. It looks better with flats or sneakers (90s style). Problem is I like wearing pants with heels instead of sneakers. They are cute, but not the best. I like the color I got. This taupe color can be be paired with many colors. I wish they were a little longer, they would have gotten 5 stars. I think they are a little pricey for the quality.

I ordered these in the “Blue” color in size Medium. I typically wear a size 8 in pants, but the size chart could have had me in a Large instead. However, the listing says the model is “wearing size Medium, Hips 40 / Height 5’3” / Weight 136. I’m about an inch and half taller, weigh about the same, and hips are maybe an inch smaller. The Medium fits me very well and is comfortable. The inseam is at least an inch shorter than the stated 26.38” (I measured it at about 25”). The fabric has a nice weight and is soft and stretchy. The waistband is beautiful and also comfortable. It seems like it would retain its size and shape, however, I have not worn them long enough to test this theory. There are no belt loops to hold them up should they stretch out, or if they would be too loose on you. The buttons seem a little loose, but don’t show any indication of coming off.Now, I know these are advertised as wide leg, but they have W-I-D-E legs! Since they are denim which has structure, If I stand with my feet about hip width apart (a natural stance), the legs of these jeans cross over each other, which looks rather ridiculous. The seams go crooked and it looks like I'm not standing straight even though I am. I have to stand with my legs spread strangely apart for them to look as they do on the model. If only I could slim down the legs, these would be attractive, but as they are, I just can’t see myself ever wearing them, not even just around the house, as the legs crash together with every step. I’ve included photos of how they look on me (5’4.5”, 30 waist, 39 hip, about 29 inseam), and also some with a measuring tape to show the actual measurements of the size Medium. I hope this helps in your decision.

I ordered these in the medium (unisex) size––I’m 5’5”, 140lbs and I found the medium to be the perfect amount of baggy without swimming in them so much that I feel like I have no shape. The elastic on both the ankle and waist is nice and not at all tight; the drawstring is just a simple cotton shoe-lace style rope; and there are no grommets to keep the string from disappearing into the elastic waistband. For me, the backside is a little saggy, but that’ll be different for everyone. Plus it will shrink over time because it’s cotton. The fabric is medium to lightweight, it’s slightly fleeced on the inside and a mostly soft outside with some texture to it, which is similar to a fine, corduroy stripe. Pepper is a great, dusty dark grey that goes with everything. I’m happy enough with them that I’m thinking of also buying them in blue.

I ordered these IWOLLENCE Women's Casual Loose Checkered Wide Leg Pants High Waist Straight Lounge Y2K Gingham Trousers Fall in a Size Small for my 10 year old daughter and she LOVES them! For reference, she is 5', 105lbs-ish, and wears a size 14 Girls from a Big Box store. These pants fit her great! The material is very soft and breathable. The overall garment quality is solid, with secure stitching and straight seams. The elastic waistband makes them very comfortable. Plus, the checkerboard print and wide leg make them very fashion forward. In this picture, my daughter just came in from playing outside all day when it is very windy... so she looks a little worse for wear in her sweatshirt and crazy hair. But when we have gone out in the past she has worn them with a white tshirt tucked in and her favorite tennis shoes-- and she got lots of compliments on them! While I do think they could be priced a little more competitively, we do love these pants!!!

I ordered these jeans in a size 34 (pictured) and also a size 32. For reference, I am 5'5", and I have a 31" waist and 45" hips, and am muscular. Neither pair fit me at all, which sucks since I love the colour and distressing. The larger pair fit me comfortably throughout the hips and thighs, but was massive in the waist. Almost comically so. I ordered a pair two sizes down, which is tight through the thighs and hips but is STILL far top large through the waist. To make matters worse, the smaller size (32, not pictured) are too short for me to wear, even with flip flops or another super-flat shoe... and I'm only 5'5"! Overall, I would not recommend these for women. They have a fit for a child: very straight up and down body with hips and waist that are the exact same size, and they are incredibly short as well. Based on my experience with these and other pairs of Levi's jeans, I think they should stick to making products for men. They clearly do not understand the shape of a woman's body.

I ordered these jeans in a size 9 in both Amal and Amal Pure colors. I already ordered the jeans in a size 9 in the color Lake and loved how soft the material is. I wanted a lighter color and chose the two Amal colors to compare which one I like better. Both of them have too much fading for my liking so I returned both. Also, the stitching is a bit off and is more noticeable on these jeans than on the Lake pair. The Amal color has the wallflower logo on the back and stitched within while the Amal Pure does not. The Amal Pure has a plain black tag within and less decorative back pockets. Also, the Amal Pure has tiny front pockets while the Amal has more normal sized front pockets that you can actually fit your hands deeper inside. The Amal color jeans are slightly lighter than the Amal Pure. In my pictures with them side by side, Amal is on the left and Amal Pure is on the right. In terms of fit, I am 5'4", 140ish lbs, 38" hips, 29" waist. I usually wear a size 7 in juniors and a 4 or 6 in women's and the size 7 in these jeans was a tad too tight so I kept the 9 in Lake. I love how soft these are but they do slide down when walking around extensively or when getting up from sitting. They are more like leggings than jeans. UPDATE: I wrote my original review in Fall 2018. It is now July 2020 and Wallflower instasoft jeans are the only jeans I wear since they are soft and stretchy and don't bother my sensitive skin. I still have my original Lake and they are a little less dark but still in great shape. I also have and wear regularly Shannon and Hayden all in a size 9. The Lake seems a little tighter than the other two but all are softer than normal jeans. I always wear these with a belt since they are super stretchy. But overall, they have held up to constant wear and look great which is surprising since the material is thin and my thighs rub.

I ordered these jeans in a size L according to the size chart as provided and they fit me exactly as expected. I am a short 5'3" long and always expect that jeans are going to be longer than what they appear on the model and though these were no exception, they are not as much longer as I expected! They fit perfect when I wear a boot with a little height , but also work well with my tennis shoes and sandals without dragging. The jeans have a crossover look at the button which give a different look and have a little button on the inside to keep the crossover waist from bunching or sliding. They have a little stretch to the denim which makes them super comfortable.

I ordered these jeans in my usual size 2/26 and they fit perfectly. There’s a lot of stretch to them so hopefully they will keep their shape and not get baggy or loose on me after some time. I’ll update if that’s the case. I really like this vintage color as it goes with so many tops. I’m 5’4” for reference on length. I weigh 132 lbs. These jeans feel thick and substantial, like a good quality jeans that will last a long time. I like that they’re more of a mid rise since I have short torso. They’re more flattering on me than super high waisted pants. These are cropped and will look cute with sandals or boots. The rise is 10” and the inseam is 27”. If you are petite, these will probably work too. They’ll just be regular length on you. I definitely recommend these flattering jeans. I think they are nice on the booty as well.

I ordered these jeans in size large, light color. I'd give these jeans a 4/5. The material is very comfortable and has some stretch to it which is very nice. The pockets are a good size and they fit my phone in there with no issues. The only reason that I took it down 1 star is because they are kind of short. I am only 5'-4" and the jeans do not even cover my ankles. I would prefer if they were a little longer instead of feeling like high waters. They are listed as high waisted but they definitely aren't.

I ordered these jeans in size medium in the black, grey color. I'm 5'8" 125lbs with a fairly straight figure, and they fit very comfortably. The material has a nice stretch to it and fits snugly but not too tight like some high-rise jeans do. I measured the rise at 10inches. The inseam was 29inches which is a little short for my height, so I'll probably wear them mostly with boots in the future. The cut is wide leg but has kind of a slight flare and the leg opening is 10inches. A few small issues are that the jean material doesn't go down into the pocket at all so when I stand up after sitting, I have to re-tuck the pockets. these are regular sized pockets, so that's good. Also, two of the three buttonholes are a little small and I have to kind of force the buttons in. Still, overall, these are good jeans and a cute and comfortable style.

I ordered these overalls for my wife and she absolutely Loves them. She said they are super comfortable. She is 5’ 5” and 112 lbs and I got her a size medium in the color “blue tides.” They fit her a little baggy but run pretty much true to size. She says that she loves the fabric and color. She also said they washed well. I think they look very cute on her and I highly recommend them.

I ordered these pants for a bachelorette event. It seems we will have custom T-shirts that we have to wear with hot pink or "Barbie" pink pants/bottoms. I wasn't sure what look I wanted to go for so I ordered these when I saw them because they were the right color & something a bit more dressy than jeans. I ordered size Large, which is my usual size. I might have been able to get away with a Medium as they are fairly loose & the waist has elastic. I'm tall (5'9") & was worried that they'd be way too short but when I look at them in the full-length mirror, I think the length really isn't bad. The material is light enough for summer. I'm not sure if I'll be wearing these for the event but I do see myself wearing them for something else. They are cute & well made & kind of different from what I normally wear, so It'll be fun to mix things up.

I ordered these pants for a holiday party — one in red rose in an XL and one in green in XXL —because I wanted to make sure they wouldn’t be too tight on my legs. The green didn’t arrive in time, but the red in XL was perfect! I am 180 lbs, 5’5” with short legs, usually a size 12. They hit the top of my foot. I wish they were a little shorter more like ankle pants to show the ankle strap on my shoes. But maybe I’ll get them hemmed before next year. Because they are such a great price and quality and I love them so much, I just ordered them in 5 more colors!! As I’ve gotten older I’ve become a lazy shopper — once I find something I love/like, I buy multiples!!

I ordered these pants in a size medium. I would normally get a large, but because I am working on losing some weight and wanted them to last longer for me I ordered smaller. They definitely will look a lot better once I lose another 10 pounds, but they are still comfortable in the meantime. They have a little bit of stretch to them, so they work. I am 5’6” 182 pounds and I’m definitely rocking a mom of 4/perimenopause body. My butt usually needs a lot of help from my pants, and these don’t necessarily do that, but a long sweater paired with it is helping me. I’m really happy with the quality for the price, and hopefully these keep me a little bit motivated to keep working on my weight loss goals.

I ordered these pants in Black and the color is true to the picture. I am 5'6". The pants were ordered in XL and they fit me well - the pants end as expected. I love the elastic waistband that is secured with a drawstring too. This gives the pants a fun look. The pants have front pockets. The fabric has an interesting feel to it. The fabric is a little thin, but not is not see through.

I ordered these pants in size medium with a 30” inseam as I have longer legs. I am 5’6” and weigh 135lbs. The pants fit great and I love the added length for the ability to wear both flats and heels. I ordered the color beige and it is not see through though I’d recommend lighter colored undergarments. These pants can be both dressed up or down for a more business casual look.
I ordered these pants in the XL. They are cute and fit great. They are pretty long. They come past the ankle and I'm 5ft6in. My waist measures 40inches and I they were not tight at all.

I ordered these pants looking for a cooler option in the Texas heat. These are perfect for dressing up or down. I got tons of compliments, I need them in every color! I’m 5’2 and 120lbs, these are a small and fit perfectly.

I ordered these pants postpartum because of the elastic waistband. They're a great lightweight pant for summer. I only have two complaints: the elastic waistband is a bit wide for my liking and the pants are shorter than I expected. I am 5'4" for reference and they come just to the floor if I wear flats. You can see the length in the picture with me barefoot.

I ordered these PLNOTME Women’s Boyfriend Wide Leg Jeans for a healthy purpose. I have osteoarthritis in my knees and plan to wear my new knee braces when my boyfriend and I start walking trails regularly during the cool fall weather. I needed jeans that would allow room for my braces. These jeans are definitely 12" wide leg baggy.I ordered the largest size 14 (size chart measurements: waist 36.6", hip 46.5") because my waist is 38" and hips are 42". Lucky for me, the waist and hips fit well. Other reviewers have said they run small. The waist band is also adjustable with additional buttonholes. I stand 5'4" and already knew these would be long on me, as are most jeans I have ordered. Sometimes, I can roll up pantlegs, but these wide legs won't accommodate. The fabric is not overly heavy, and the stitching appears good. Because they are wide-legged, I was able to slide these on even while wearing my sneakers, and no one will know when I wear knee braces underneath. I did notice a bit of a buckling with the zipper though, which was even more apparent after I washed them.I checked to make sure these jeans were colorfast before I washed them in cold water on a delicate cycle. Then I tumble-dried on medium heat with other jeans but removed and hung them 15 minutes before the end of the cycle. I wore my white shirt that's more form-fitting. I didn't notice any shrinkage in the jeans, other than maybe a half inch in the length. However, the zipper’s buckling was definitely more uneven. I figured out it's better to zip up, first, and then button the waist.Overall, this wide leg style doesn't really look attractive on me because of my apple shape and short height, but these PLNOTME Women’s Boyfriend Wide Leg Jeans will serve a purpose for me to start walking again for exercise so I can start losing this excessive weight.

I ordered these specifically because they had a “short” option. I’m 5’2 and have a hard time finding pants that are an appropriate length. The first pic is me holding them up. They come all the way up to my chest. The second photo (black shirt) is my husband. He’s 5’10 and the length fit him perfect. I ordered 3 different sizes (all short) and all three were comically long. These aren’t for short girls don’t let the tag fool you.

I ordered these stretch denim bib overalls for outside work. I’m 5’5” and 135 lbs. I ordered a medium because I hoped they would fit well, but be a bit loose. They were, but if I was wearing them as fashion I would go down a size to small. The overalls are 75% cotton, 23% polyester, and 2% elastane. They are well-made and sturdy. I like them. There are two buckle straps, three side button closures, two side pockets, and a bib pocket. I had to roll up a small cuff on the medium. Machine wash on cold. They look very nice on and I think they will last a long time and maybe look better with age.

I ordered these to go under tights so I can actually wear my skirts in the winter! Super soft, stretchy and comfortable! Also have extra fabric so they go around my heels. I got a L/XL based on other reviews. I’m 5’3 130ish with a bigger butt and wide hips . These fit well, definitely stretchy and had plenty of room to move, they are a bit long just cause I’m short but most things are.. I would recommend! Almost didn’t get them cause of the negative reviews but sooo worth it!

I ordered these to have some pants I could wear out for strictly for comfortability because I gained 40 pounds in just 3 months after I turned 43. (No more high metabolism for me lol). But when I tried them on, they fit SO GOOD. I thought they’d look like something you’d wear to an office job, but no, they look so much better than expected. I thought they’d be a little short in length, but they come down low, just as I like & are high waisted elastic. I’m so glad I ordered these, might get another pair in a different color. True to size as well. I’m 5’3” & I weigh 160 lbs. & I ordered an XL

I ordered these to wear on a girl's trip to Nashville. I normally do not like wearing shorts, but these were loose and comfortable. I am 5'7 and 152 pounds a size large was perfect. Not too tight on my waist and long enough to keep my behind from hanging out the bottom.

I ordered these Women High Waisted Cargo Jeans for my 13-year-old daughter in a size 8. She is 5.7 with a 28.5 inch and 38.5 inch hips. She usually wears a size small in women’s clothing. According to the size chart on the product page, a size 6 should have been big enough, but I went with a size 8 because she wanted a more relaxed fit, and a size 6 in other brands has been too tight recently. This is her review: These jeans are very comfortable and easy to walk in. I like how they have the side pockets and are long. They don’t feel tight around my waist and don’t feel like they’re going to fall off. I also like the color.

I ordered this as I need some clothing that would be appropriate for daytime meetings or lunches. This is perfect. It’s so versatile. I could wear it with heels, flats or boots. I could also wear it with a wide belt or a slim one. The material is light weight and breathable despite being denim. It’s a bit shorter than I would normally wear in the front but it’s longer in the back. According to the size chart, I’m in between a medium and a large so I ordered a medium. I’m 5’6 and my measurements are 37-31-44. When I first ordered the dress, it fit a bit snug but I’ve lost some weight and it fits just right now.

I ordered this because my 14 year old grandson wanted it. We'll see how well it holds up. He loves it so far. UPDATE- Five weeks and it ripped. He didn't even wear it more than once or twice a week. A piece of junk. Save your money.

I ordered this belt to use until my designer belt arrives, but I like it enough that I will continue to wear it even after my designer belt gets here. it is a really cute belt that really ties any outfit together. It looks rich and like it’s good quality. For reference, I ordered a small and I am 5’5” and 122 pounds.

I ordered this dress for my granddaughter and she loves it! I ordered it in an XL but she probably could have worn it in a L. She is 5'4 and weighs approximately 165lbs. It fits her great across the shoulders and the length is perfect. It was a bit to large across the middle though so she added a belt and it looks great!

I ordered this dress for my granddaughter and she loves it! I ordered it in an XL but she probably could have worn it in a L. She is 5'4 and weighs approximately 165lbs. It fits her great across the shoulders and the length is perfect. It was a bit to large across the middle though so she added a belt and it looks great!

I ordered this dress to wear to a country music event. I have some tan boots that I adore, and I think this will pair perfectly with them along with my custom, cowboy hat and wrangler backpack. The ruffles on the sleeves are cute, but still feminine. The length of the dress is excellent, I didn’t want something too short. The denim is durable and does not feel cheaply made at all. It feels like it will last through a few washes as good denim should. I chose the lighter color as I knew I would be outside and didn’t want something too dark. I’m not a fan of the belt, so I’m probably going to change that out. It wraps around my waist and just dangles in the back. I’m 5‘6“ tall and my measurements are 37 inch bust 31 inch waist and 44 inch hip. I’m between a medium and large, but I decided to go with the large due to my hip size. It did fit true to size. Overall and very happy with it and I can’t wait to put my full ensemble together for the event!

I ordered this ELLEVEN Women’s Side Slit Denim Skort in a size Medium for my 10 year old daughter. I looked at the size chart and noticed that the small looked like it would run a little on the small side, figured that the material would shrink, and decided to size up accordingly. For reference, my daughter is 5' tall and 105lbs. The skirt was a little big on her.... But that's to be expected! Here's what we like about it: •WELL MADE: This skirt doesn't feel cheap! The material is thick, the stitching is straight and correct, and the buttons and zippers are secure. •FASHION FORWARD: The little slit on the front of this skirt, the color, and the built in shorts underneath all make it really Y2K. My daughter is obsessed!!! •LENGTH: It's not too short and not too long... Keep in mind, she's only 10-- so it will probably be a little shorter on a taller adult. My daughter really loves this skort and so do I! HIGHLY RECOMMEND!
I ordered this for my husband and it was true royal blue. He is about 5’11 and wears a 30 pant I think and we went with a small.

I ordered this jacket/dress (whatever you want to call it or wear it) for my birthday ! Loveeeeee. The denim is sturdy, thick and nice! I weigh about 250lbs and purchased a 4XL for a big look! It has so much room in it and I decided to wear it as a dress. So many ways that you can wear it and accessorize this jacket. I plan to purchase the other colors and wear it different ways! I probably could have got away with a 3X for a tighter fit. Worth the money.

I ordered this Scarlet Darkness Women Wide Leg Pants High Waist Linen Casual Loose Lounge Trousers with Pockets in a size medium for my daughter, who is 5.7. Her size measurements are 32/27.5/37. She typically wears a size small in women’s clothing, including in tops from the Scarlet Darkness brand. I ordered a size medium because the size chart showed her at the upper limit of a size small. I’m happy I did because the medium fits her well. These pants look and feel great. They look very summery. It does come a tad wrinkled, but it fits the style. I inspected the seams and the fabric and didn’t find any irregularities. My daughter loves these pants and looks forward to wearing them once the weather improves.

I ordered this Scarlet Darkness Women Wide Leg Pants High Waist Linen Casual Loose Lounge Trousers with Pockets in a size medium for my daughter, who is 5.7. Her size measurements are 32/27.5/37. She typically wears a size small in women’s clothing, including in tops from the Scarlet Darkness brand. I ordered a size medium because the size chart showed her at the upper limit of a size small. I inspected the seams and the fabric and didn’t find any irregularities. My daughter loves these pants and looks forward to wearing them once the weather improves.

I ordered this skirt because I am tall (5’9”) and loved that there was built in shorts! Despite there being no reviews/photos when I got it, I am so glad I did! It is very comfortable and stretchy, and well constructed. It looks great and I can’t wait to wear it again!

I ordered this to wear over a dress and I love it. I wasn't sure which size I would need, so I ordered a small and a medium. I'm 5'2, 129 lbs. The small fits perfectly... the medium is too large. I am very happy with my purchase and decided to order the darker denim, also.

I ordered three different types of Levi’s trucker jackets all in size Large (recommended size) for a side by side comparison. Please note that the 3 trucker jackets DO NOT COME WITH A HOODIE. I was simply making sure I could layer a hoodie underneath the denim jackets as this is how I like to wear them. All 3 Large sized jackets passed my hoodie test and Large felt like an accurate size recommendation to the style of each jacket. The sleeve length was long and perfect for me. If you’re looking for a more “form fitting” jacket, order the original trucker in your normal size (it does have stretch if you’re between sizes), order the Ex-Boyfriend a size smaller (no stretch.. watch out for arm length though), and skip the Baggy trucker altogether or try ordering it two sizes smaller (no stretch.. watch out for arm length changes ordering small sizes). My measurements: Height 5’8” - Weight 155lbs - Shoulder to Shoulder 17" - Bust 38" - Waist 28” - Hips 40". All of the Levi’s denim trucker jackets have inside “pockets” which is a feature I have always loved from Levi’s denim jackets. If you notice from the photos, each jacket is about 2” longer than the next. The Original trucker jacket being the shortest length and darkest wash; pictured in the first photo, all the way to the left (top & bottom) of the second photo and all the way to the right in the third photo. It is meant to be roomy but more form fitting, while the other two styles are meant to be baggy. I was still able to layer the Original trucker over my hoodie comfortably in my recommended size. While the Original trucker fit nicely and probably would look best over dresses out of the 3, I chose the Ex-Boyfriend because I already own a form fitting denim jacket and wanted something different. I liked the Original trucker the least because it was so dark, had all black buttons, and looked too new and clean. This sounds weird, but all my black jeans are all faded, so I preferred the faded washes on the other two black trucker jackets. The Baggy Trucker and Ex-Boyfriend trucker also have no stretch and have contrasting brownish brass buttons which felt more vintage. Notice the Ex-Boyfriend jacket has buttons on the right “men’s side” while both the Original Trucker and Baggy Trucker have buttons on the left “women’s side”. I hope my review helps you decide!

I ordered two different colors and they’re completely different sizes. I ordered two eights one in the light blue and one in pink and the pink is way too small, way too short and a different color than the picture. It’s more of a hot pink instead of that Barbie pink. The sizing is so different I thought maybe I accidentally ordered the wrong size but they both say 8 on the inside. I’m only 5’5 and the pink jeans came way too short for me. Kept the blue returned the pink. Very disappointed. I’ve washed the blue FIVE times and they still small horrible. When will it end?

I ordered two different sizes in the same pair and color of jeans. As you can see- I did not receive the same color nor even the same style of jean. This is probably Amazon’s fault but I received a used pair of jeans as my second pair. I did try on the one new pair I got- I ordered a 25 in this pair. Usually I’m a 0 in jeans and these ran a little too lose in waist for my liking. I had to add a button to get them to fit nicely around my waist. These are not super high waisted which is awesome for my short self. The regular length is long for my short stature. I’m 5 foot on a good day. I ordered the short length for the size 24 I am reordering…. hoping I get the same pair as pictured just in the size smaller. Will update if I receive those. Updated : 24 fits great!!! Should be the last pic in my list! I also got a new pair this time :)

I ordered two pairs of 14L straight leg jeans and tried them on and they weee HUGE. The paper tag said 14L W32 L34, but they were MUCH bigger than that! My husband wears a size 48 waist and when he tried them on they were big on him. I checked the inside label and it said 18L, but I have a feeling that’s wrong as well. Don’t bother buying from this seller.

I ordered two pairs of these shorts. The blue ones are great. They are slightly darker than what’s pictured but not that big of a deal and the fringe looks great on these. However, I also ordered the black ones and had to return. The fringe on them looked absolutely ridiculous. It was way to long and almost looked like large feathers hanging down from them. I wish I would have taken a picture, so just beware when ordering the black ones. The fit on both where great though. I’m 5’2” 127lbs for reference, I ordered size small and they both fit perfect.

I ordered up one size for a more baggy fit, and found the measurements to be accurate. I am 5’4”, size 8 pants. These are a little thin so not sure how they’ll hold up in the long run. However, my first wear was great and I got lots of compliments.
I ordered white in size Small Short. I'm 5'2" and they're still tad bit longer and looser than I like but the fit is nice overall. Ht 5'2" Wt: 145 lbs
I ordered XL (5’9”/ 165 lbs). They pull on and are comfortable. I just wish they didn’t flair out in the leg. The sizing confused me. I ordered beige which is more of a “yellow” beige. Nice material

I originally bought the deep gray in a Large. I'm 5'5, 185 pear shaped with a long torso. These were SO comfortable and looked great with a pair of heels. I ordered them because none of my actual dress clothes fit and I dont' like feeling "stuffed" into clothes. As you can see from the photo, no one could tell they were yoga pants. The faux zipper and added front pockets help with that. I love them so much, I'm back for an additional color. They have more of a polyester feel as opposed to the pure cotton feel of most yoga pants. I like this feature as they do not pick up dog hair as easily (and yes, I have a dog). They travel well and do not wrinkle. I did use a little starch to put a crease them which helped with them looking like actual dress slacks. Great quality for the cost.

I originally bought the size 16 regular and they were so long. I’m 5’3 so I returned for the 16 short and they are a perfect fit. Super comfortable and perfect for the office. Has pockets and very flattering on my plus size body. Great value for the money

I originally bought this belt (size small, 5’5”, 124 pounds) in black and enjoyed it so much that I ordered a navy one. It has just enough stretch to it to make it comfortably fit. It’s an easy stretch and clasp to put on. I wear these belts with many different outfits.

I originally purchased this belt for a festival, but have loved the way I can incorporate it into many of my day to day outfits. Definitely recommend buying! I’m 5’0 and 128lbs, no complaints on the size. It is too big on my friend who is 5’2 and 115lbs, for comparison.

I own many pairs of Levi’s. I was hesitant to order these as I just lost some weight and these don’t have as much stretch as some styles. They are 97% cotton. Nice medium weight denim glad I didn’t size down and ordered my regular 8 short I’m 5 2.5 and 140 lbs. these fit me perfect. I’ll be careful not to shrink them until I lose more weight. Not sure why the white is different but I like them.

I own these cargo pants in just about every color, and I was shocked by the quality of the material. The fabric is smooth and gives the pants a tailored look, with an elastic band in the back that prevents gapping. There isn’t much stretch, but they are true to size. I typically wear a size 16 or 17 depending on the brand, and I purchased these in a size 18—they fit perfectly. The pants have functioning pockets and a real zipper, unlike some that just have decorative details. In my opinion, they are tall-friendly. At 5’6”, they look great with heels. These can easily be dressed up for an elevated casual look or paired with sneakers or flats and a tank top for a neat, casual style.

The fabric is smooth and gives the pants a tailored look, with an elastic band in the back that prevents gapping. There isn’t much stretch, but they are true to size. I typically wear a size 16 or 17 depending on the brand, and I purchased these in a size 18—they fit perfectly. The pants have functioning pockets and a real zipper, unlike some that just have decorative details. In my opinion, they are tall-friendly. At 5’6”, they look great with heels. These can easily be dressed up for an elevated casual look or paired with sneakers or flats and a tank top for a neat, casual style.

I personally have the free people Jean that this is a resemblance of and I gotta say I like these way more. The fit is better and more flattering in my opinion! Super comfortable fit. True to size maybe even run a little big! I’m 5’8” inches- 145 pounds and am wearing. Size 6

I personally love these jeans. They look really cute and stylish. I like the color since most of my pants are dark. These actually make me feel young again. I love the side bow decor which comes undone easily at first but I really need to tie them up well and then there is no problem. The size fits as expected since I normally wear small for 5’4” in height and 118 lbs in weight. The length is great for wearing flats or sneakers.

I picked these up for my 13yo, who loves things baggy and "cool". They did not disappoint. The fabric is thicker than I expected (yay!! No threadbare jeans!), and the cut seemed to fit her well. They are long on her but as she's only 5'2" tall, I expected that. She usually wears Doc Martens anyway and likes a platform, so I expect the back cuff getting scuffed up well be an asset not a deterrent from wearing them. Well worth the price and they definitely impressed me.

I picked these up for my daughter in a size small in the fresh bright blue color option. My daughter is 5’4" and 120lbs. These are quite big, especially in the length. She is happy with the high cut waist and the wide leg. These hit her at the belly button, but she needs a belt to keep them up. We washed them in hot water and machine dried them in hopes of shrinking them, but there was not much shrinkage. Made in China from 71% Cotton, 27% Polyester, 2% Elastane they have a metal zipper and button closure and nice deep pockets. Overall they are a cute, and very current style of jean. There is whiskering to the dye at the leg creases and the color stayed fresh. I did wash them inside out to protect the color and prevent fading.

I posted pictures of first trying on and after wearing for a few hours so you can see how they loosen up. Going first wear they fit well and don’t become overly loose. Length is perfect. I’m 5’9, 220 lbs, and my inseam is 35 inches.

I posted pictures of first trying on and after wearing for a few hours so you can see how they loosen up. Going first wear they fit well and don’t become overly loose. Length is perfect. I’m 5’9, 220 lbs, and my inseam is 35 inches.
I probably could have went with a smaller size for them to be less baggy but I like them. Super comfy. I ordered a medium and I'm 5' 5" and 115lbs.

I purchase this pants for my yoga practices at home, but they are great to go out too. I love that you can combine a lot of shirts colors with this. I have a big ass haha so I got an L and it fits perfect, also I'm a short person, no more than 5'3" and they are not too long for me. Higly recommended.

I purchased 24 Regular, Carbon Glow. I normally wear W24/L30 in Levi’s (I’m 5’2” and 103 lb). All the Levi’s jeans I bought in the past was L30 and it’s perfect length for me. It says Regular=32” on this page, I knew it would be longer than what I have but I didn’t expect this 724 high rise straight (724 high rise “slim”straight on tag) would be that long. I’m going to return this and order short one. This jeans fits like leggings (it’s not thick material), stretchy and comfortable. It’s 71% Cotton/21% Viscose/6% Polyester/2% Elastane, made in Cambodia. Waist size is perfect, from hip to thigh fits like skinny/slim jeans and relaxed fit from knee down.

I purchased 3 *different* pairs of these jeans. One pair of "Immaculate, One pair of "Janice" and one pair of "Mascara." All in the same size, 16L. All described to be the same cut, "Gold Label" etc. etc.. All you have to do is chose the 'color.' But the price varies wildly. So I assumed something other than the color of the jeans was the basis for this reasoning. Wrong. Apparently the price is soulely based on popularity. Seriously? Please read on, because I do love these jeans & I did get a more than satisfactory response from Amazon. I'm 5'9" and thick in the middle and prefer a little extra length to my jeans. I probably could have gone a size smaller, but I wanted to allow for at least ten percent possible shrinkage due to washing. And I don't want to look ridiculous. The jeans I ordered have slightly different shades of dark blue with gently faded patches. But there really is no other way to tell which pair is which. Remove *all* the tags, and you have 3 pairs of the same jeans on in different shades. When I showed my husband, he didn't notice much of a difference between the pairs either. Just that the 3rd was slightly darker. However all three pairs cost different prices. The most expensive pair being titled "Immaculate." Once the jeans came in the mail and I had tried them all on, surprisingly *they all fit exactly the same.* I have no problem admitting that I'm very happy with all three pairs. But laid out side by side, all 3 pairs of the jeans look *very* similar. Was I sent the same model *twice*, or what? Why is one pair so expensive? No where on the jeans' tags do I see any difference between them other than their scan numbers. They have no 'names' or clear numbers, like my beloved "501's." If I had gone to the mall and picked out the same jeans myself, they would have all been from the same shelf at the same price. They are all the same length, cut, rise, style, and fit exactly the same. The inside and outside labels, text/print and logos are nearly the same as well. And only one pair states "Gold Label" on the outer back leather tag. It's like the one pair of jeans came out a year earlier under a different name - but is otherwise the same in every other way to the other pairs. So I don't get why one pair cost me twenty one dollars, the next pair costing me twenty four dollars, and the last cost a whopping thirty eight dollars? I'm seriously considering returning the most expensive pair/s (which ones though?) and reordering the cheapest pair/s again. Like I said, I *really* like these jeans. They all *fit* the same and fit well and are flattering. But I feel like someone is trying to pull the wool over my eyes here, and I'm really annoyed by the difference in cost because that is the only thing that really differentiates one pair from another, aside from the color. Because if it's color/dye that costs more, that's absurd, and one or more pairs has to go back. In the mean time this whole thing has kept me from actually wearing any of the jeans. So. Which pair or pairs of jeans do I return?!

I purchased a medium and still trying to decide if I want to exchange for a small. These are really cute and long. So tall women these are great for you! I usually get a size 4 or a small in pants. I am 5'9 134 lbs. Hope this helps.

I purchased a Medium because the last belt I bought on Amazon was a medium and it fit perfectly . My waist is a 36 , and this belt is waaay to small . I measured the belt with a tape measure . It measured 38 inches from buckle to end but the measurement from the buckle to the first hole is 30 and to the last hole is 34, therefore this belt should be for no larger than a 34 waist . So make sure you go a size up

I purchased a medium but probably could have done a small. I’m 5’2”, 120 lbs. The back has elastic for a little give. They were a little long. I rolled them once and did a quick hand stitch. Glad I did. I wore my Doc M with them and super cute!

I purchased a size large and they fit great other than the crotch area seemed baggy or had more fabric than necessary. The waist and length were perfect. I ordered a size large. Usually I’m between a medium or large and typically wear size 8 in American Eagle jeans. 5’4” and length was great especially with a shorter heel. Giving less stars just due to the cut of the fabric and how baggy it was in the crotch area.

I purchased alllll the trending polyester, pleated, wide leg pants off Amazon and these are the best if you're over 5' 8". The quality is good and these have faux back pockets (unlike the others). The white color are terribly see-through, not lined, so I'd pass on them (see photos) but the other colors are a win. There is a slight variation in the length for each color but not noticeable. See my photos for the different colors purchased in natural light.

I purchased four pairs of these for a party of four of us gals for a hippie party. Two of us are 5'6" tall, and the pants fit us great. We are both size 8-10 so we bought a Large, and they were very comfy. The other two gals were 5'2" and 5'3", and wore wore size 6. They wore a Medium. The fit was very comfy, but they had to hem them as they were tripping over them. Cute as can be, great color, wash good. The photo is of me...5'6" regularly a size 8.

I purchased the 2xl in Blue. I want to love this jacket, since it fits perfectly and is exactly what I am looking for but the smell is so BAD! It arrived with tags on and in a plastic ziplocked bag. Once I took it out it had a horrid odor, like your face being smushed up to a new stack of tires or like it was dipped in chemicals! I washed it with a brand name quality detergent most of us use and lightly dried it with my favorite smelling dryer sheets. Still it smells bad! I then sprayed it with a wrinkle eraser spray that smells like clean cotton and hung it. After letting it hang to air out for two days it STILL SMELLS! For anyone that can overlook the smelliness, the collar is not frayed and the 2xl is the perfect size for anyone that is a size DD, 18 or 20, and 5'10''+. It has a bit of a stretchiness to it, which is nice. However, it is much lighter denim than the ones you get at some other big brand names and stores.

I purchased the Galaxy jeans in an 11short. For reference: I am 5’3 and (currently) about 160-165 lbs… uuuggghh… the holidays. Also, my body is mostly an apple type shape. I love these jeans so much! These jeans are a bit loose at the waist which is never the case! LOL! But not loose enough for others to notice - just need to wear a belt with them when I go out. I am normally 150 and am ordering 2 more pairs in a 9 short! They definitely do hug you in all the right places!

I purchased the size xl guessing that it would fit around 16 to 18 size. The size is accurate for 5' 5" tall and 190lbs. These are a true, heavy weight denim material. I love that these are real, thick denim with no spandex blend. I missed doing up a button on the button fly closure, as I'm used to zippers. And pardon the crocs-not my shoe of choice... These are super comfy, in the house or running errands. They can be dressed up a little or down. This is such an on-trend style right now, and looks good paired with a slimmer fit shirt. These are an excellent value for the quality!

I purchased the Size: 6 | Inseam Length: 28 Inches | Color: Cape Town-waterless. They fit true-to-size, I am 5' 3" ~133 lbs and curvy. The fit was snug but flattering with a generous amount of stretch. The 28" length was perfect - right at my ankle. For anyone wondering, these fit very very similar to the pull-on version (which I also purchased) and the sizing is consistent between the two. In my opinion, they are equally as comfortable and you get real functioning front pockets with this version. I absolutely would have kept them if the color was as depicted in the photos. However, the color of the whiskering and fading is much more yellow and dingy in person and not at all white like the pictures. Overall, these are a really great value for a twenty-ish dollar price point especially if you find a color you like. I'm trying to lose the quarantine 15 and not looking to invest in expensive jeans until I do.

I purchased the X-large in light blue. I'm 5'5" and 190lbs. I typically wear a size 16 jeans and these were tight in the hips and waist. I don't think these have much stretch to them as there was only a little give in the material. These are definitely a light weight material, which would be good for spring and summer weather. I feel these "would" be comfortable if the size had fit better, as is,they don't have much comfort because they are tight to sit in. The quality is good, well stitched, solid button. As for flattering...once again, size. I would say these fit a solid size 14 in women's jeans. These are a decent valueif you get the right size.

I purchased these as part of a hippie costume for my 16 year old daughter. She is 4’10” and 88lbs, so they’re a bit big on her but really cute. They aren’t the best made.. thin ( but silky) material and poorly sewn waist band, but suitable for the cause. She looked really cute. I wouldn’t but these to wear around all year, but they made a great costume!
I purchased these for a rave and they were incredibly comfy and stylish! For reference, I ordered a medium and im 5’2 and I weigh 128.

I purchased these for Sparkle Day and Rock Your School day! I love that they do not itch as the inside does not have a seam that allows the sequins to scratch your skin. The inside is a smooth material! They were a bit warm when I wore then outside in 80 degree weather! I am 5’ 6” and they were very long; I had to wear heels! The flare is excellent! I ordered a small and they are high waisted and fit great!

I purchased these for work. I’m 150 pounds and bottom heavy but these pants fit me well. They’re very soft and stretchy. I love the deep pockets. I wish the legs were longer but I don’t think that’s worth losing a star.

I purchased these in a size 9. I am 5ft 6in, 160lbs and wear a ladies size 8-10. I used to buy these at Kohls but they stopped carrying them. I wear these fulltime (40 hours/week) and they last about 6-8 months. I bend up and down with my job so I am pleased that they last 6-8 months. Each time I have replaced these khakis it has been because they rip in the inner thigh area. Before shopping for them here I searched for bootcut khakis EVERYWHERE! I couldn’t find anything close to these. Everything I tried was either a skinny leg or cropped leg and the few that were bootcut were horribly shaped. I love these khakis and I’m so please I found them on here! So pleased that I purchased an additional 5 pairs!

I purchased these in both black and khaki. Love that these pants are both dressy AND casual. They are a tad looser than I was expecting, but luckily not too long as I'm only 5'2 and they don't need to be hemmed. The material is nice and light and feels nice too. Oh, and there are pockets!

I purchased these in Ellis, Black, and Seattle, all size 6 Medium. First off, they're not very high rise- more like a mid-rise. My Levi's all have a much higher rise, so if you're looking for a true high rise, look elsewhere. Secondly, you're going to want to order a few different sizes bc they're pretty inconsistent. The Black pair were so tight I could barely get them over my hips! The Seattle were slightly looser, but still tight, and Ellis was just right! All were a tad long (I'm 5'6 145lbs). Going to return for Ellis size 6S and Seattle Size 8 Short. The Black pair had a cheaper fabric quality, more like a jegging but the Seattle and Ellis washes are ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ quality. Will definitely try those two washes in a Short!

I purchased these in men’s first, due to the fact that people said the men’s fit better. The men’s were lower waited and fit every where except for my waist there was a big gap in the back. When i ordered these women’s i struggled so much with the sizing. i’m usually a 6-8-10 depending on the jean, i new these didn’t have much stretch so i went with a 13-32. im 5’5 for reference and these are a little long but with boots will be fine. These fit like a glove, i’m a little wider on the hips and smaller on the waist. Highly recommend getting a size or 2 bigger than you’re normal size. Overall LOVE

I purchased these in my normal size small, black, they fit TTS, very stretchy, forgiving and soooooo comfy. I’m 5’3”, 130#, short torso with long legs. Loved these pants BUT I personally didn’t feel they were a keeper for me bc of my body type. I needed something to elongate my torso and this high waisted pants just doesn’t do it for me. Will be returning. Would be great for work wear.

I purchased these in the color B-BLACK in a size XL. For sizing reference, I'm usually a medium-large or a 8-12/29-31 in bottoms and jeans. If it helps, I wear a size 6 or 8 in Lulu leggings. I'm 5'3" tall with a short torso, and my measurements are about 44"-33"-44" (bust-waist-hip) right now, give or take. I'd say they run a tad small if you have bigger hips/butt. I sized up because I was concerned about them being too tight, and I'm glad I did! I could do a large but I really like the looseness of the XL, as it's comfy but still flattering, and with a bodysuit, the fit is perfect in the waist (this one is from Pumiey, btw; I have a review of it as well). They are loose in the tummy area without being too baggy. I'm glad the pleats are super subtle. This style does not have the elastic back, as I don't love that, but I do wish they had some little fake slit pockets in the back, like other slacks do. I'm a little on the shorter side and had some extra length at the bottom, even though my legs are longer in proportion to my body, so I could wear a pair of heels and still be fine, but I don't often wear anything but flats, so I'll probably end up getting them hemmed by an inch or two. The only small complaint I can make is that I wish the button was darker, as I feel the tan one cheapens the look a bit. The material is a bit hard to describe, but I'd say it's pretty standard Amazon loose slack material, if you've tried others. It's thin and a little slick, but not very stretchy, if that makes sense. They feel kind of cool on the inside and they move nicely. I couldn't tell you how well these will hold up in the long run, but I'll try to update after I've worn and washed a handful of times. Overall, I'd definitely recommend these, but maybe size up if you have bigger hips/butt. I've been looking for some cheap slacks to try out because I haven't tried to dress nicely for the office in so long, not since I gained weight years ago, and these are a nice intro back into it. I actually purchased this exact style in B-BEIGE in the same XL size, so I'll post pics of those. I may grab the C style next, since they have tonal buttons and slit pockets in the back, even if they have elastic in the waistband too.

I purchased these pants back in May and didn't wear them until recently Sept. This was the only time I've worn them and the 2nd pair I've purchased. The same tear happened in both pair in the exact same place. The inner thigh(right). The pants didn't fit tight at all. However, there is no stretch in the fabric. I wear a size 16-18 (5'6";230lbs), and I purchased the XXXL which were a comfortable fit all around, especially on my thighs and belly.

I purchased these pants for a beach vacation! Perfect for those sunset nights! These pants are light weight, flowy, and perfect for short girls! I’m 5ft 1 and these pants hit to the ground with flat shoes, which is how I like my pants. They are very wide leg and the color is vibrant! The only con is the waistband is a little snug than I prefer.

I purchased these pants for a Safari trip. The quality is decent for the price and they fit great. They are comfortable but the waist band is a little tight even if it’s elastic. I’m 5’4, 150 lb and I purchased a Medium.

I purchased these pants for camping. They are really comfortable and have good stretch. I am 5’5 and 135 lbs. they fit perfect and I love the look of them. Definitely going to get some good use out of them. For outdoors and fall winter outfits!

I purchased these pants in camel and white. I am 5'10" 222lbs and I bought them in xxl long. I love the length. I think the colors are true to pictured. The quality seems good. As you can see, I carry a lot of my weight around my middle. These pants have a wide waistband that helps suck me in a little. My only complaint is that, even with my big middle, the waist could be a little with belt loops added. They stretch out a little after wearing. I've tried to order them in black but twice I received a different pant, one being a Levi's brand, neither did I like. I'd really like to have the same pant in black. They're comfortable pants. I like them.

I purchased these pants in dark blue previously in 6L. I am 5.8 and 140 lbs. 6L fits perfectly. Then, I came back for these light blue ones, but these are cut differently. Not as curvy as the dark blue and tighter on the legs. They still fit, but are not comfortable and too tight in the tighs causing these to ride down when walking. I have attached photos to show the difference. The color is nice, though I could live without the light distress on these...the blue is a nice light jeans blue. Update: I have purchased 2 more pairs of the same, thinking maybe it was just that one pair cut differently, but now looking at all 3 light blue pairs here, all look the same and all are different than the dark blue pair. They will go back as they are not comfy.

I purchased these pants to pair with a champagne colored crystal top I got for NYE last minute, and they ended up being perfect! Was worried that they may not be long enough, or would be too large around the waist, but a small fit me very well. I’m 5’-8” tall, 128lbs, and normally bounce between a small and medium due to my height but more slender figure. There was enough room in the waist for me to sit comfortably, but they didn’t fall below my belly button when standing. I wore heels with these, and they fell just below my ankles… JUST long enough for someone my height to wear heels with in a size small. They’re very comfortable (feels like silk pajamas!) but they’re lined enough to not be sheer. Was able to use a standard iron on these without damaging the fabric (which is important, because they do wrinkle easily.) however, would suggest you iron them inside out. Love!

I purchased these pants to wear to concert and I absolutely loved them. They are really comfortable & they look great. Only thing I would suggest, is making the back pockets deeper (the back pockets are a little shallow and I could not fit my cell phone in the pocket) but other than that... the waist was comfortable with the elastic band, the pants length was perfect and they looked great... not to mention they were affordable. I plan to get another pair. I am 5'8" and weigh approximately 198 lbs and the XXL was a perfect fit for me.

I purchased these to wear to a concert: Tori Kelly's "Purple Skies" tour. The album screamed Y2K vibes and... hello, PURPLE!! The fit: The pants fit a little bit snug around my waist. I ordered a Medium, as I'm typically a medium in leggings and sweatpants. Even though they fit snug, I don't know that I would have sized up because everywhere else, the fit was just right.. any baggier I wouldn't have loved the look as much. They come just above my bellybutton, so they'd look nice with a cropped top as well. I'm 5'7" and they hit right above my ankle; however, depending on the shoe you wear, it won't look like you're about to wade through a flash flood. You can also loosen or tighten the draw string at the ankles. The color: These pants are VERY purple. Less of a royal purple color, more like a deep lilac; which I quite like (see the second pic for the true color). So, keep that in mind :) The quality: Without a doubt, these are some pretty well made pants for an amazon find. It's always hit or miss for me when shopping for clothing.. sometimes things are so thin and very see through; but, the fabric used for these pants are on par with any decently priced cargo's from a traditional retailer. I've washed and dried them with no shrinkage or color bleeding and very minimal wrinkles. All of the pockets are functional!

I purchased this jacket in black, size M (I’m 5’3 for reference). I absolutely love this jacket! The length was perfect, and the material was surprisingly soft! It was slightly oversized, but not too big where it can swallow a small frame. I will definitely purchase the other washes!!

I put above that these run a little small, and I'm not sure if that is correct. They fit and are comfortable, but they don't lay as flat as in the photo. The waistband makes the stomach area puff out a little, so the fit isn't as flattering as I'd like. However, the color is beautiful. A little brighter than shown on the Amazon page. Those look more like Burgundy. I don't mind- I love both colors. I am almost 5' 8", which fits like in the image on Amazon- a few inches above the ankle.

I put these pants on and thought, I’m washing these up and wearing them tomorrow. And I did. Then I got home next day and thought, I need more colors. They are the best pants for anything. I’m 5’4” and weigh 115. I wore a small in the short. It fits perfect. Nice material. They hang nice and while you certainly can wear them for yoga, I’m wearing them for anything, everyday, or going out. No iron. Wash, dry, and wear.

I RARELY do reviews BUT these are my favorite shorts EVER! I am so pleasantly surprised how these fit. They are SO comfortable, cute, flattering and have great stretch! I’m a mom of 3 and these are the perfect length and fit for my body! I got the black ones too and I love them (they aren’t a high rise but still fit amazing)! The high waist is perfect and is not TOO high. I WOULD BUY THESE OVER AND OVER. I am 150lbs , 5’7” and I ordered a medium. Perfect fit!

I rarely post a review and wanted to be sure I did so for these jeans. I’ve purchased several pairs of jeans online and have not been happy. But these are great. They are a little stretchy, perfect for curvy women. And have a great bootcut/bell bottom leg. I weigh 130 pounds, 5‘2“ and have a small waist with larger hips. I normally wear a size 6 or eight depending on the cut. I purchased a size 6. Great fit I highly recommend them.

I rarely post a review and wanted to be sure I did so for these jeans. I’ve purchased several pairs of jeans online and have not been happy. But these are great. They are a little stretchy, perfect for curvy women. And have a great bootcut/bell bottom leg. I weigh 130 pounds, 5‘2“ and have a small waist with larger hips. I normally wear a size 6 or eight depending on the cut. I purchased a size 6. Great fit I highly recommend them.

I rarely write reviews but this one is worth writing about- I can’t say enough how perfect this jacket jacket. I am 5’4 , 130 lbs and the small fits great. I don’t plan to wear sweaters under it but if you do, size up because the arms are very fitted.

I rather enjoyed the look and feel of these pants, but I decided to return them because they did not fit the way I was hoping. I am 5'8" 155lbs - I am on the larger end of a medium / smaller end of a large. I was looking for a relaxed/boyfriend fit. And after reading the reviews, I decided on a medium, as some of the reviews said these pants ran on the larger end. I did not find that to be true. They had more of a regular-to-slim type fit - snug'ish on me. I am ordering a size large, and will update my review after I get the new ones. **Update** I received my size large pants. The fit is more to my liking. More roomy, but not frumpy (see pics).

i read a few comments about these overalls and i was still skeptic about them like one other customer stated she had been looking for overalls for 15years ive also been looking for about the same years if not more ive always had trouble finding clothes n my size womens pants never worked for me im 5ft 7in currently weighing in at 181lbs so i looked read looked read and looked and on this product i ordered xl hoping they werent too big considering im not an xl my usual pants size are either too big in the waist and just right in the length or vise versa but these are WOW i slipped these on and didnt want to take them off they’re so comfortable and roomy they stretch im glad i got the xl cause a large wouldve been too short in the length now if you’re my size more or less i suggest you get xl for comfort and length the crotch area is a bit low but i just might buy more n other colors truly one of the BEST things ive bought from amazon and ive had a lot of disappointments from things i’ve purchased but not these i urge anyone who wants these to try them out you wont be disappointed unless you get the wrong size again thank you

I read a lot of other reviews before purchasing, mostly about fit. I have an hourglass shaped build at 5'2 and 190-200 lbs. The fabric is soft and not super stiff like denim can sometimes be. The cut of the skirt is super flattering, even if you have a belly. I could see this looking especially nice on a top heavy or straight framed body type due to how it flares from the waist. The belt is of a nice quality and the "metal" (feels like a really hard plastic) on the belt and buttons are a nice antiquated brassy color. The buttons are purely decorative and not at all functional. I got an XL based on my measurements and it was actually a little roomy, but tightening the belt fixed the issue. The belt loop has elastic in the back so it does have some stretch to it. I would definitely recommend knowing your waist/hip/leg measurements to make sure you get the right waist size, but also because this is a fairly long skirt, especially if you're short. The color is accurate to the listing (but looks lighter in my pictures). I bought this for a specific event but like it enough to keep it in my regular routine. I would say it's worth the price and would probably recommend to others.

I read a lot of reviews saying how bad these are and sizing is off. While I agree, I followed the sizing guide and ordered a size smaller than I usually wear, and they fit perfect. I'm in love with these. So, do not hesitate to buy them. They are extremely flattering and FINALLY a pant for my tall girls!!! When I sit down and then stand back up, I don't have to tug and pull on my pants!! For size reference, I am 5'7, 120 pounds, short torso, long legs, 28in waist, and about a 30 hip. Ordered a 1.

I read all the reviews before ordering these and was leery but ordered anyway because I was desperate for a pair of jeans. I’m glad I did and I plan to order a second pair. I am 5’ 5” and weigh 158 with most of my weight in my tummy area. I ordered the 33” x 32”. They are a little long and definitely a little baggy but I dress for comfort and love the fit!

I read other reviews and was a bit nervous about purchasing but I wanted something loose and flowy for trip to Aruba. These were perfect. The pictures are after being packed (I did light iron them before packing) but not after. The 2nd two picture are after hand washing (thanks to a wine spill on them) and letting them air-dry. I wore a light linen top, wish I had tucked it in for the picture. These pants were very flattering. I just ordered two more. For reference: I ordered a small, and am 5"2", 130# at the time of the pictures and wore 2" sandals.

I read other reviews that these ran small, so I had expectation these would not fit. But not for me! They fit just right! I am 5'4" between 160-165lbs. The waist looks small, but these pants are stretchy and fit very comfortably. I love the material, they are flattering and love the color. I will be getting different colors for sure!

I read reviews and saw they ran small. I usually wear a size L-XL in pants because I have thick thighs and wide hips so I decided to go with an XXL and they fit perfect, maybe even a little loose which I like. I’m 5’9 183 lbs. these will be perfect for Fourth of July, Memorial Day or Labor Day!

I read reviews for this jumpsuit saying size up. I orginally bought a XXL and it was really big on me. I went 2 sizes down and bingo the Large is alot better. The leg part is long so shoes with heals will be needed. The label on the package says this a plus size jumpsuit. So that helped me on my second size decision. A good bra helped lift up the small sag in the front crotch area that I don't care for. Now I'm happy and ready to wear this for my bday. I plan to add a chain belt that drops in the front for added sexiness. More hips would definitely work if you do this size. I am 200lbs, 5'8, and 40D bra size. Hope that helps someone.

I read the reviews and decided to order the shorter length 29 inch inseam But it is too short. I think these run true to size. I'm just under 5 ft 5 and these were a little too short for my liking. I read the reviews and sized down! I am typically a size 6 (5’3” with long torso and thick thighs/booty) Glad I did because they fit perfectly! So cute! I am usually a 30” inseam so these are long on me, which I intended, as I want to wear them with boots or heels!

I read the reviews and took a leap of faith by ordering. Just as described. I ordered 4 colors and I'm very happy. Cant wait to wear the red for christmas. The red and black were sold out in my size, and I kept on checking daily until my size became available again. It was supposed to be delivered on the 17th, but came today December 7, 2023.Btw, I'm 5'7" 140 lbs and the length and size was perfect. I ordered size small.

I read the reviews before buying this and they were all right! I was so pleased with the quality and have gotten multiple compliments already. I ordered the 2XL- I am 5’4 and 225 pounds. I like how baggy it looks while open. It isn’t super heavy which is perfect since I live in TX.

I read the reviews before purchasing, but honestly I love them. Are they the most high quality jeans ever? No. But I don’t plan on wearing these often. They are very soft and stretchy. I had no problem with them staying up. With sneakers on, the length was perfect for me. I am 5’3, 230lbs. Got many compliments on them

I read the reviews previously to ordering and a lot of people were recomending to go down a size so I ordered a medium but they were too tight on my thighs so I returned and ordered a large and they fit amazing. I weight 170 lbs but have always had thicker thighs but absolutely love the way they fit and love the fact that they’re high waisted instead of mid waist.

I read tons of reviews but still wasn’t sure on a S or M. I got both for sizing and will be returning the M which I didn’t even try on because the small fit perfectly. I’m 5’2”, 135 lbs pre pregnancy, flabbier build and no booty. It’s true that these run big because I would not normally order a S in anything for my shape. I’m currently 28 weeks and 150 lbs with more growing to do. These fit great right now but I could stand to fill the belly band more which means they will probably get me through the summer all the way to delivery (due early August). I thought they would have more stretch but I’m not complaining. They’re comfortable and cute and really the perfect length. I do wish the front pockets were functional!! Will be ordering the other color in a S. Can’t beat the price.

I really Like these overalls. They are really soft but sturdy denim. The legs are roomy and not tight at the bottom, more of a flair than a straight leg. I’m short and kinda square 5’3” 155 pounds and a large fit me just right except I have to pull the straps as tight up as they would go, which I didn’t love. I like the dark blue color. I washed them and didn’t notice any shrinkage. They are very long so I rolled them to mid (ish) calf.

Luckily I order another pair of white shorts the ones with 4 buttons for the same price and is much MUCH better quality. The second shorts is call Thunder Star ripped jeans. I am 5'7, 210 pounds. I really do like these pants. Pretty much waffle-knit sweatpants disguised as slacks. Couldn’t be more comfortable, but they are sooooo long. I’m 5’0” and these are just long enough to be annoying. Too long to the point where platform sandals and heels won’t help. Luckily, I’m cool with this style, but if you hate your pants dragging on the ground and you weren’t blessed in the height department — then these may not be great for you. Decent quality, but you can tell they’re a little cheaply made. Good thickness and comfortable fabric. Great value for the money, I just wish there was a petite option. I also think the sizing is very forgiving and I could’ve sized down.

I really enjoy these cargo pants. They have a very sturdy feel without being bulky or heavy. I love that I can put my wallet and phone in both pockets and I don't feel like the pants are being dragged down. The color is a good medium without being too bright but not faded. I do wash this on delicate with WooLite to prevent fading/shrinking though. In terms of the fit, I rather like it. I am 5' 2", 170 lbs. I definitely carry most of my weight in the middle. I also have a "B" belly, so I tend to prefer things that I can wear high waisted. These cargo pants can be worn perfectly high-waisted, but also don't hug my lower belly too much that it's unflattering.

I really enjoyed the fit of these jeans! Although they were oversized, the fit was intentional and true to size. They were a bit long on me as I am 5”2, and had a good amount of stretch to it. Very flattering and ultra comfy!

I really like how these fit on me! I’m pretty short, so if you’re over 5’2” or have proportionally longer legs these are probably going to be cropped on you. They have a nice amount of stretch and still look professional. The hip/thigh area is nice and roomy. I’m not so sure about the giant belt loops, they really stick out on me but otherwise I have no complaints and I see myself wearing these to work a lot.

I really like the cut of this jacket. I am 5’8/235 and got a size XL. It hits just below the waistline and can button up if needed. It has a snug fit and wouldn’t work with anything thicker and T-shirt material - very tight in the upper arm area. I like the stretchiness of it, and the pockets are deep enough for a phone and keys. The fabric is super soft, but does show every little detail if you spill or get anything on it (including streaking from laundry detergent, which you can see in these photos). I agree that it has a strong smell out of the package, but washing it took care of that. It works well for fall weather, not thick enough to replace a jacket though.

I really like the fit of these jeans however I wish they were one size smaller they feel a little loose around the waist… A size 4 was the smallest, but an easy fix if I wear a belt. The length was short on me so I got a little creative and undid, the 2 1/2 inch stitching at the bottom to make them longer! I am 5’7” tall so length is important, especially when I’m Wearing shoes with a higher heel other than that they’re really really cute. The material feels really nice.

I really like the fit of this jacket. I'm taller (5'11") and it's hard to find sleeves that are long enough. These are just right, maybe slightly short when my arms aren't at my sides, but it's acceptable, especially since I tend to roll the sleeves on my jean jackets. It has a nice fitted waist area, though because I'm tall the slight flair at the bottom does hit my slightly above my hips. I don't anticipate buttoning the jacket often though so again, it's acceptable. Now, the color. I had read reviews so I knew what to expect but this is definitely a tan, bordering on khaki color. When I read silver, I think grey. Nope. Knowing it would be more beige than grey I still ordered it because I wanted to be able to wear it with all of my jeans (white jeans too). If you're hoping for grey, don't bother. I took a pic with two sweaters I have in my closet to show the grey vs beige, I also took a pic compared to some white jeans to show the difference there. I already have a dark blue jean jacket but it's pretty old with more of a cropped style...I might end up replacing it with a dark blue one of this style since I do like it so much.

These pants were perfect in the rise for me - very unusual for off the rack pants! - and could maybe use a bit of hemming, but I'm lazy so I'm perfectly happy with them as is. For reference, I am 5'3" -125# - 36B with an athletic/boyish build.
