I really like these jeans! The length is perfect for wearing with shoe with heels. I am 5'7 and 122 pounds and ordered a size 6. It is not too tight and the color is lighter than the photographs. I am considering ordering another pair in a different color.

I really like these jeans! I'm 5'2", 120lbs, 28" waist/34" hip and ordered a size 27 in Blue-4. The lay-flat measurements are as follow: 13.5" waist, 10.5" rise, 25" inseam (so pretty close to what the size chart says). They're made of a soft, stretchy material - I usually prefer non-stretch denim, but I like these because they don't feel thin or cheap, and they're sturdy enough to hold their shape. The online photos make them look like they're made of all cotton and have a button fly, though neither are true in real life. However, I still found them to be very comfortable and flattering, and they're not too distressed, which I like. They're more of a skinny/straight leg fit than I expected, but the waist fits perfectly so I don't think they're too small. All in all, I think they're a very versatile style of jeans, and I'll enjoy wearing them. Please note: be careful when washing these. I threw them in the dryer in hopes that they'd shrink a little bit and get a little tighter, but they shrank vertically instead! I lost at least half an inch off the length of the legs. Not a big deal when you're short like me, but someone taller might have an issue with it.

I really like these jeans. They're a little short (I'm 5'9") but they're ok with sneakers/flats. They fit well and are comfortable. But less than 20 days and the button already fell off. And it's not because they're too small. I'm super bummed. 😔
I really like these paint, comfortable and look good. I’m 215lb and 5’6” I got an XL 33”inseam should of gotten a 31” inseam plan to get another pant in another color

I really like these pants a lot! They’re super comfortable. I’m 5 foot 7 and I’m about 135 pounds. I ordered a M/L. The only reason why I gave them a 4/5 is because you can tell in the third picture that the lower stomach area is a tad big. But other than that they’re 👍🏻👌🏻 I also made sure to add as much “sharpness” as I could to show that they don’t really show your panty line either. So they’re not super thin. I can never find jeans that fit me on my waist and everything else, have a small bit of extra tummy. But these pants more than do the trick. And they come with real pockets too. Which is always a major plus!

I really like these pants and man are they stretchy. I’m 5’9’ and about 150 lbs. (I’m usually an 8/10 in pants) I originally bought a large, but since I’m pear-shaped (W: 27.5”, H: 42.5”) they were tighter in the legs than I was wanting, although the waist fit perfectly. So I ordered an x-large and that was overall a better fit. I have to wear a belt to avoid slippage in the waist (story of my life) but the legs are not quite as a snug. (Except the calves…they are still really tight. Maybe I have big calves?) So I guess my advise would be to order a size or two up if you don’t want your pants to feel/look painted on. They seem pretty good quality. The material is a bit strange, but the color is a beautiful maroon. I’m pretty sure I’ll order another color sometime soon.

I really like these pants and wanted to keep them, but the inseam is only 30.25 inches when the description and the tag say they're supposed to be 32 inches long. I purchased the size 6 in black. They fit true to size, and are a nice mid weight- substantial enough to be smoothing and not look cheap and flimsy. I'm tall with long legs, and really need the 32 inch inseam length. I thought maybe I just got a bad batch, so returned them and reordered. Unfortunately, they were the same 30.25 inch length. I contacted the seller and they said to return them and try again in a month or so to reorder. I will do that, and certainly hope that they corrected their quality control issues, and produce the pants in the stated length. It would end my endless search for a comfortable pair of nice looking black slacks.

I really like these pants! The blue color is nice and you can dress these up or down. The buttons on the belt line make the design more unique than others. It has good quality and is in style right now. I’m 5’7” and weight 155-160 and the medium fit nice.

I really like these pants! They totally look like slacks and look constructed but have the soft stretchy comfort. I have a 30 inch waist and about 42-44 inch hips, so I purchased the Large. I feel I could have sized down a little and they would have still worked, but considering I’m wearing these to work I think lose is better hopefully they don’t stretch out too much when worn for a few hours. Overall VERY HAPPY!

I really like these pants! They totally look like slacks and look constructed but have the soft stretchy comfort. I have a 30 inch waist and about 42-44 inch hips, so I purchased the Large. I really like these pants. I got them more for casual wear than for work attire, but you could easily dress them up for work. What I really like about these is the waffle knit material. It just gives the pants something different, other than a straight work slack. I’m 5’9” and around 150 lbs and ordered a medium. I almost went with large because I like the waist to feel a little loose, but these are good because the back part is elastic so there’s some stretch to them. I got the 29” so the length is great for me. These pants are definitely worth the price.

I really like these pants. I love how baggy they are. The waistband has a button, but also elastic in the back. The color is as pictured. They’re a little short on me, but I’m 5 foot 10 so probably will be perfect length for most. I’m going to undo the cuff at the bottom to lengthen it for me. Super cute!

I really like these pants. I wasn't sure at first about the fabric as it's super lightweight but it works. I like how I can either leave them hanging at the bottoms or cinch then in with the pull tab (idk the name for it). I'll likely keep them cinched though my only gripe is the cord hangs long when it's all the way in. Not sure how we'd fix that but I may end up tucking it in if it bothers me. I'm 5'6" ~130lbs and ordered a small. Will be great for travel and casual days out for sure.

I really like these pants. They are light weigh and so comfortable. They are well made and well worth the price. My only problem with them is, they are a little long on me. I am just over 5'2" Even though I really like this product, I would not purchase them again for me, just because I do not like how long they are. I would however buy them for a gift for someone. I do recommend this product.
I really like these pants. They fit great and are pretty comfy. I’m 5’11 290 lbs and bought a 2x. Elastic in the waist and ankles is perfect.

I really like these pants. They fit true to size and are very comfortable. They are a little long, but I am only 5'2" so I am used to pants being longer on me. Nothing a slight hemming won't fix. The color looks like the color in the advertised picture. They say summer pants, but they are quite heavy so I do think they will be fine to wear in the fall and winter.

I really like these pants. They have plenty of stretch making them comfortable. They are long but at 5’5” not picking up puddles outside. I wear a 12 usually but since I’ve gained some belly weight I opted for a 14. I think I’d prefer the 12, so I’m going to order those. The 14 is comfortably a little too big and has stretched as the day has gone on. Material is so soft and quality is nice. Fall or Spring pants due to weight but year round depending on your location.

I really like these pants. They're dressy enough for work or an event like graduation, but are also very comfortable. I'm super short, 5 ft even, so I had to use double sided iron-on hem tape to be able to wear these (I hemmed them about 3 inches) and they're still to the ground. I ordered a small, I fluctuate between small and medium 5 ft, 130 lbs

I really like these right out of the bag. I had two babies back-to-Back and I have DR and lots of skin. The waist band on these are gentle and feel forgiving when I sit and stand. The butt fits great! Now I’m 5’7 and ordered a tall so that I can fold the bottom for cuffs and these actually have a normal length, but it also gave me a longer hip and thigh which I LOVE. It’s been why I order long pants. The demon is a great color. Need to wash before wearing because it smells like manufacturing and it’s mildly irritating to the skin. The denim is thin and has the perfect amount of stretch. I would buy these in every color! 10/10 would recommend

I really like these soft, tweed like, pants by CLOZOZ. Nicely manufactured with all seams, hems, waistband, cuffs and belt loops flawless on arrival these wide leg pants fit me perfectly from the listing's sizing chart and I am 5'6" size 16. The pants flow nicely when in motion and the material to me feels soft and very comfortable when worn. I’m short so I knew the split hem would be too long, but rolled up they look great. Since it’s a raw hem, I might just cut them off. I’m 5’0”, 148lbs, and normally wear an 8 short in GAP or Abercrombie jeans. I ordered an 8 and they’re actually too big! They’re best for curvy figures; roomy in the waist, hips, crotch and butt. Plenty of stretch and wiggle room. I’m afraid if I sized down, they’d be too snug in the thighs. The fabric is really soft and feels similar to Abercrombie or American Eagle denim, but unfortunately the waistband feels a little scratchy and uncomfortable. Another issue is the back pocket placement. Instead of lifting my bigger booty up, they tend to pull it down and flatten it out. The back pockets are super low! Size down if you’re between sizes, or size up for a looser fit. Hope this helps! 🙂
I really liked these pants, but the length and width were just too much for me. I’m 5’3” and 150lbs. They fit nicely everywhere and the material is great.

I really love these pants! They fit great and are very comfortable and flattering. The pockets on the back are a nice touch because I love wearing leggings but sometimes wish they looked more like real pants. The back pockets do just that by making them more versatile pants that can be dressed up or down in a lot of styles! I like the shiny black leather-y kind of look, because it just adds a little touch that differs them from other black denim jeans or jeggings I have. The quality seems great so far. I'll update over time if they wear out quicker than expected or something of the sort. The only downside for me personally is that I ordered the wrong size. I normally wear Large for bottoms (5'4" 185lbs). But, I've gained a few pounds recently and wanted a bigger pair for my closet because even some of my large pants are feeling tight lately. I thought I'd go up a size and get an XL in these just to have a pair that fits me good now. It turns out they're a bit bigger than I expected though, because I feel the looseness of them and constantly have to hike them up, whereas I think they would stay up fine if I'd gotten my normal size. So my suggestion is stick to your normal size because you don't want leggings/stretch based pants to be loose!

I really wanted to like these pants! I mean, they look SO cute on the skinny model!! 😋 But, on me -- they just look frumpy and make my body look bigger than it actually is. 😝 Unfortunately, these slacks just didn't hug me in the right places. For one, I'm almost always bloated and this waistband was WAY too tight, as in -- tight enough where I cut a slit on each side of the waistband so I didn't feel like a stuffed potato. 😂 For reference, I'm 5'2, weigh <125 lbs., wear a DDD bra size, and have defined, slender legs. These pants accentuated my belly, made my booty look flatter somehow (still not quite sure why....?), and didn't do anything to help my legs stand out...at least in a positive way! 😝 Although very comfy and flowy, I feel like these pants made my legs look bigger than they are. In addition, they were just a tad little too long while wearing flats, and they didn't seem to look right with the two different types of heels I tried them on with. While I will say the material is quite soft and comfortable, I wouldn't rely on these pants to keep me super warm when I'm feeling really cold. They'd be best suited to wear on days when there's a light breeze. Again, while I really wanted to like these pants, unfortunately, they're not a home run for me. But, if you're rather slender with a small tummy, you might love them. ✌️

I received the bell bottom jeans with a belt. I love these, they fit as expected. I got the size i normally wear and they look really good. I received these today and couldn’t wait to try them. I am a curvy 5’ 7”, 190 pounds, wearing a size Large as recommended. I recently bought these white pants for my Euro trip, and I’m so glad I did. They’re super comfortable with just the right amount of stretch from the polyester and spandex blend. I’m 5'2" and 135 pounds, and the M size fit perfectly. I love that they’re high-waisted and have a bit of structure with the button and zip so much better than just elastic waistbands. The pants have a nice, creamy white color and worked well for both casual days and evening outings. Highly recommend for comfort and style!

I recently got a pair of these grey (“pepper”) 100% cotton sweatpants. I decided to size up to an XL in case they shrink. Ordinarily, I wear a M or L depending on the brand, and for reference, I am 6’ tall and weigh 150 lbs. These sweatpants are medium weight, seem well made, and have a relaxed fit that is very comfortable. The waist is slightly large on me, but the rest of the fit is perfect, and there is a drawstring to keep them in place. I usually wear a 32-34” waist, and these are a bit bigger than that, which makes sense because I sized up to an XL. The pockets are medium to small in size, the length is good, and I expect these will get a lot of use.

I recently lost the vast majority of my clothes in due to Hurricane Florence, and buying pants is always difficult for me, so I wasn't really looking forward to replacing them. I'm 5' 7.5" and I've always had a small waist relative to my hips and butt, and when you add that combo to long legs?! Fuhgeddaboudit when it comes to finding pants and jeans with the right fit...or so I thought until I tried these babies on. To terribly exaggerate, once I easily fastened them, colors were brighter, lights shone down from the heavens while denim-tuxedo clad angels sang Ginuwine's "In those Jeans!" In the real world, I made my husband stare at my hips and butt as we both marveled at how amazingly these jeans fit. I even had jeans left at the ankle, and that is HUGE for me. I got 2 pair to try on through Prime Wardrobe and I'll be getting all available colors now that I'm aware of this magic. Thank you to Levi's and Prime Wardrobe for changing my life! And get yourself a pair of these jeans if any part of my story sounds like your life.

These pants are a very nice length for someone of average height, but even positioned below my waist, they fall too short to be cute on me. They do have a half inch seam so I'll let them out. I think these pants are a great value -- really, really nice.

I ride a motorcycle and sometimes it is a bit chilly on the legs like in the evenings or early mornings in spring and fall and these help with that. They'd also be great for sporting events and festivals when the weather isn't the warmest. These are nicer than adding leggings under your pants because you don't have to mess with 2 layers as these are all in one. They're very soft and feel nice on the skin and the jean material is nice and heavy and not thin. They're like a straight leg cut and fit nice around the waste. I am between a 10 & 12 size depending upon how they're made and I'm 5'6.5"; I got a large and they're a perfect fit.

I saw an influencer post on these and gave them a try. I have since bought another pair as they are perfect!! Great for travel too. I’m 5’6 and probably 165lbs in this photo and the large fits well. I have wedge heels on with them and I ordered the medium length. Nice detail! Highly recommend.

I saw reviews of people reporting how they’re 6’1 - 6’3 saying that these trousers fit them. I have a hard time believing this as I’m 6 ft nd this looked like a joke on me today at work. I saw these jeans on an Instagram ad. I absolutely love these pants. They are stretchy enough, and very comfortable. I am 5'6 and 210 pounds, so based on other reviews I decided to go up a size with a 2xl, they fit perfect. Planning on buying another pair in black. Hope this review helps.

I saw these jeans on TikTok and was worried about sizing as well as the jeans being barrel jeans (unsure how they’d fit). I am 5’3” and they are barely cropped if at all, and the size works well for me (I range anywhere from a 6 at old navy to a 10 at h&m). I ordered a size medium of these and in the Blue color. One thing I’ll say is the smell! These hearts are painted on with what smells like acrylic paint. It’s a VERY strong smell and honestly I’m a bit afraid to wash them as I’m wondering how the hearts will hold up! I will update after I’ve washed a few times on the smell and how the hearts maintain :) if they do hold up though these are a surprisingly cute purchase that exceeded my expectations!

I saw this hoodie all the time in my ads for almost the past year it feels like, and I've had it saved for a long while also. I saw this overall on IG and it was going for double the price than what it is on here, I took my chances and omg, don’t regret it, very good material, length is just right and I’m 5’6, its not stretchy at all though so just be careful with that

I send half of what I buy back from Amazon but these were a great fit. They have a great length, nice stretch, overall flattering. I am 5’5 125 and ordered a size 4. I seriously considered keeping these for the sole reason that they’re flattering on my hard to fit frame. At 5’ tall with a small waist and large hips/booty/thighs, finding a decent pair of pants is a project. These actually fit really well, didn’t add bulk to my hips, and went right down to my feet. Butttttt, they came without the belt shown in the photos. The seam at the top is twisted so it rubs on my stomach in a very uncomfortable way. And the material just feels crappy. They’re a 65/35 cotton/polyester blend, but they feel like 1970s polyester. These are going back.

I seriously want to live in these trousers! The material is so soft and reminds me of a really high-quality pair of yoga leggings and the fabric is the perfect thickness. They're polished enough to wear to the office, but they're also so comfortable that they're perfect for yoga or just lounging around the house. The fit of these pants was perfect for me. I ordered the Medium, and for reference, I'm 5'6", 150 lbs, and a size 8. They fit true to size, and the stretchy material makes them super easy to slip on and off. I love that I don't have to fuss with any zippers or buttons - the buttons on the front are just decorative. The high-waisted design is perfect, and the waistband has a gentle compression that sucks you in a bit without feeling tight or uncomfortable around the tummy. I can wash these pants on a gentle cycle, hang them up to dry, and they're ready to go in no time. Plus, they don't wrinkle. I'm definitely planning on ordering more of these pants in different colors. They're such a great find and so comfy!

I shimmied into these jeans & was pleased with the fit & the look, however, while wearing them around the house for a short time, I quickly noticed I was having to pull them up & readjust them frequently. For size reference, I am 5'3" with the widest part of my hips measuring 46" & ordered an XL.
I should have sized down one size I’m 5’6 178 pounds. I love the flowy material but they are very generous in size.

I should’ve actually paid more attention to the photos as they showed how long they were in the leg area. I simply love these Corduroy Pants! I’m reviewing a size small and the color is tan. I’m 5’2 and I weigh 125 lbs. They are true to size. I highly recommend these Corduroy Pants!
I sized down so they would be tighter and hold me in better and it worked! These are a little too long for me (5’7’’) so I may have them hemmed. Make my legs look long and thin!

I sized up and still feel like I might want a larger one. I’m 5’61/2” and 132lbs and it’s tight in my arms and a little shorter in them too but very cute and comfortable. Just think it might be very tight if I decide to wear a sweater or anything under it.

I sized up in these shorts since I hate it when they feel too tight or too short. Large fits comfortably without digging in, and I get extra length. Unfortunately, it kind of gives me 🐫 toe… For ref, I’m 5’0”, 150 lbs, 36D & got the brown color in Large. luckily they’re SO stretchy! In person it’s more of a UPS uniform color, 😂 or a poop emoji copper-brown shade…. I’m hoping it doesn’t wash me out when I have a tan this summer. I won’t reorder and I probably won’t wear them much.

I sized up to make sure it was a true baggy look and they seemed to fit perfect so my normal size would have been small. I’m 5’1 and these hit perfectly at my ankle. Will look real cute with sombas or boots

I so happy I got these pants! They are light weight but not sheer. The blue floral is a really cute pattern and pairs well with a royal blue top. For reference, I got a small and I am 5'6" 140 lbs, and normally wear a size 4.

I spent two hours shopping at Target yesterday and found very few items I was happy with. No jeans for sure. They were all low cut or way to loose. I felt defeated and looked on Amazon. I Stand 5’7 And The Length Of These Pants Fits Great! Even With Heels On They Still Were Long Enough. Also I Am Petite For My Height 154lbs So I Ordered A Small. These Pants Fits Comfortable.

I struggle finding pants that fit just the way I want. I’m extremely picky and like the reviews said these are almost fail proof…IF you are 5’3 or 5’4. Height specific. I’m 5”4 , prob 145-150lbs. I struggle to find jeans that fit because I have a longer torso with short legs and short rise. For reference, I am 5’4”, 140lbs with an athletic build. These lower rise jeans fit perfectly. The low rise hits right just below my navel, so they aren’t super low. I can wear them with a boot that has a heel or sneakers for a more casual look. Very flattering on the booty as well! I’m happy to find jeans that finally fit me! I got so tired of high rise options not complimenting my body type. Levi’s ftw! Update: I ordered the lighter color because I loved my first pair so much. Still love the fit! My only issue is the wash is not as light as pictured. It is more of a mottled acid wash. So if you’re looking for a super light denim, this is definitely darker.

I struggle to find office pants so bad. These are extremely comfortable, stretchy and the stretchy waist band doesn’t make you feel bad about your body. The length is perfect with heels (I am 5’5) I would size down 1 though because of the stretch. Buying every color next

I swore I ordered a 28inch waist, but received a 27. When I got it - just in a bag, I instantly thought I would have to return it. We all know the drill and pain of trying on pants… but the 27’s slid over my hips and then buttoned up. I could have even gone with a 25, I think. 🤗 I am 5’3” 150lbs - 28inch waist, 41 and 43 inches on the high and low hip, and a 30inch inseam. These jeans hug my thighs but are not a struggle to get on. I also have really big calves, so this is surprising. My hips are easily accommodated with the zipper and button. Once on I have a tiny <2inch back pant gap which is easy to hide or covered by wearing a belt. So that’s the almost perfect part. Had I gotten a size 25 or a high waisted pant I do not believe this would be a problem. On the other hand I have a short torso and my rib-hip length is <4-5inches so I’m always hesitant to get a high waistline pant for this reason- as it shortens my appearance by a foot. My butt looks good, but it does not lift it. My husband thought they wear nice on me… I haven’t washed them yet - I’m just happy to have a pair of pants that fit well enough and flatter my appearance. Should they shrink or unravel in the wash I’ll amend / update this review.

I swore I would never, ever wear Barrel jeans until I saw a TikTok influencer post about these. Just got them in and they fit perfect. I usually wear an 8 but I bought a 6 in these. These are moderately wide and bowed. They have a nice stretch. I’m 5’8 and 139lbs. They hit right at the ankle (I don’t have long legs for my height). Highly recommend!

I think I’m giving these a 3.5, I went back and forth with the star rating. These are very comfortable pants. I wasn’t sure whether to go with the 0 or the 2, and the short or the regular. I’m 5’3.5” and my go-to Jean is a size 1 in Celebrity Pink. I ordered the Size 0 Regular. They seemed a tad long for me (I think I like the shorter length on me in tighter jeans) but they were perfect with rolled cuffs. They are definitely more of a relaxed look than I am used to. The legs were looser. I liked the rise and it was high enough to contain everything but I don’t think it gave me a flat butt the way some high-waist jeans do. Great lighter color. I think I would have preferred the shorter length, but with the looseness of the pants I’m not sure that would’ve looked better. So I’m ultimately glad I went with the 0R. If you are on the smaller side of a size 0, you may find these too big, but that’s what free returns are for. The thing is these pants STINK. They smell so bad. It’s like formaldehyde meets moth balls. I thought after a wash the smell would be gone but nope! These still wreaked after a wash. I’m not going to return them and hope that a few more washes will get the smell out, but if you’re sensitive to that, I’d skip these pants.

I think that is because fits me a little loose that I don’t like how they fit, maybe an XS is my size, these pants are very comfortable and soft, very stretchy and warm, perfect for fall and winter, the material is not see through, the length is perfect for a petite max 5’5 or is going to be too short. For references im 5’1 - 130lbs wearing small.

I think that the blue squares on the pants are darker in real life and they are in the product photos, but I still like them overall. The pant elastic waistband with no drawstring. I ordered these pants in XL and they fit me just fine. According to the tag, the pants are 93% polyester and 7% spandex. They feel very comfortable and they’re pretty stretchy. The pants are a bit see-through, so you may want to wear seamless nude underwear or an oversized top to cover your caboose.

I think these fit as expected and are super comfortable! I love the style and ordered another color as well. For reference, I am 5 ft 6 in tall and 138 lbs and a size 10 fits well, maybe slightly big, but I will wash and dry them to get a bit of a tighter fit in the waist.

I think these khakis are great! They have gotten me through all the seasons, washed, and dried. The color is typically khaki color, cotton, so definitely consider drying. I knew buying the 4 would be a little big but anticipated shrinking them some and now they fit perfect, not as small as a 2 though. Th pockets are great also, none of those fake or itty bitty ones. Zipper and 1 button are of good quality and I’ve never had to iron either. I liked so much I ordered the lighter version too but they’re almost a pale pink so these are my favorite because they go with more items in my wardrobe. I’m 4’11”, 120lbs, 36 hips for reference.

I think these would be perfect if the straps were a bit shorter. I have to have the metal clip thing way up on my shoulder which looks and feels awkward. I usually never buy clothes online because I'll never know if they will fit, but I'm so glad I took a chance with these jeans. Amazon was recommending I go with a size small because I typically wear a size 28 (size 6 or 7 in Old Navy), and I'm so glad I went with a medium based on existing reviews and the minimal difference between size small and medium according to the size chart. I'm a runner, just shy of 5'4'', and my pre-pregnancy weight was around 138-139 pounds. I'm now 18 weeks and my weight has only gone up about 4 pounds, but I was desperate to find some maternity jeans as I was getting increasingly uncomfortable from the pressure resting on my lower abdomen, especially when sitting in a car. I normally wear size 28 (size 6 or 7 in some brands like Old Navy). The inseam length of this size medium is perfect. No area on the jeans feels too tight or too loose. I love how high these sit on the hips because it feels like they aren't going to slip down. I expect there may be some minor shrinkage when I wash them so it may feel a little bit tighter post-wash, but they seem stretchy enough to continue feeling comfortable. I think these will also be awesome postpartum jeans. One thing I was concerned about was that the waistband wouldn't be supportive enough, especially as I get closer to the third trimester, but I simply decided to purchase a separate maternity band for extra support and to wear with workout pants or dresses. Overall, this is a great buy and I recommend for any mamas that are feeling uncomfortable!

I usually never buy clothes online because I'll never know if they will fit, but I'm so glad I took a chance with these jeans. Amazon was recommending I go with a size small because I typically wear a size 28 (size 6 or 7 in Old Navy), and I'm so glad I went with a medium based on existing reviews and the minimal difference between size small and medium according to the size chart. I'm a runner, just shy of 5'4'', and my pre-pregnancy weight was around 138-139 pounds. I'm now 18 weeks and my weight has only gone up about 4 pounds, but I was desperate to find some maternity jeans as I was getting increasingly uncomfortable from the pressure resting on my lower abdomen, especially when sitting in a car. I normally wear size 28 (size 6 or 7 in some brands like Old Navy). The inseam length of this size medium is perfect. No area on the jeans feels too tight or too loose. I love how high these sit on the hips because it feels like they aren't going to slip down. I expect there may be some minor shrinkage when I wash them so it may feel a little bit tighter post-wash, but they seem stretchy enough to continue feeling comfortable. I think these will also be awesome postpartum jeans. One thing I was concerned about was that the waistband wouldn't be supportive enough, especially as I get closer to the third trimester, but I simply decided to purchase a separate maternity band for extra support and to wear with workout pants or dresses. Overall, this is a great buy and I recommend for any mamas that are feeling uncomfortable!

I usually NEVER order jeans on-line; they are all made so differently and can fit so differently, but I already had a pair of Democracy jeans so I thought staying with the same brand might help. I love these jeans - they are SO comfortable! I am 5'9", 155# and the 10 fit perfectly.

I usually order clothing made in China a size larger. I ordered xl (5’7” 165lbs) these are true to size so xl is xl. They are very baggy. But that is what I like. I also think 100% cotton will shrink. They are defiantly med weight almost heavy but not too heavy. Still NOT see through light lofty linen. The seams are very well made. I have the ones with pleets. I easily rolled them and they are adorable and they stayed rolled would look wonderful with high heels, flat sandals or convers. These are super baggy. Over the top comfy. I am very picky about my baggy linen pants and I am going to love these till they fall apart. Right now I am going to get green and burgany. I would order these in your size not bigger.

I usually purchase large but for trendy looks I size up. I purchased an xl and they fit perfect. The flare isn’t too long, as I’m only 5’2. With heels they’ll look even better I’m sure. I could’ve purchased a large but I could probably break out the serger to tighten a little.

I usually wear a 14/16 but with these being stretchy, I bought a 14. I think I could have gotten a size smaller. I'm a 5'4 shorty and you can see that the length was perfect with these shoes. They would work well with flip flops or boots also! LOVE these Jeans!
I usually wear a 27 and got a 26, there is no stretch but they fit perfectly. I am 5’7 and I also love the length. They are super cute jeans.

I usually wear a 27 short in Levi’s, these are a 26 short which fit fine. I’m short, so these are a little like floods on me but will be cute for summer. The material is very thin and stretchy, almost feels like if I accidentally step into one of the knee holes while putting them (like I do often) I would rip the entire lower leg off. For the price, I’m keeping them. My weight is 128, ht is 5’1

I usually wear a large but since the back of these has a stretchy waist it was just not snug enough for me. I ordered a medium instead and the medium is perfect! So comfy! I have a 31” waist and 41” hip.

I usually wear a medium . 5ft2 1/2 133lbs . This medium fits but on first hole! Love the style !!!
I usually wear a medium. I ordered a medium (I'm 5'4 and 169lbs) 8 months pregnant. They fit well with room to grow the last 8 weeks. Stretchy and a good length for me.

I usually wear a size 12 and I’m 6 feet tall. I got a size 9/36. They are a little loose and plenty long. Definitely order a smaller size. But the fit is great and I love them.

I usually wear a size 6 in LuLu brand, but ordered 8/10 per reviews and glad I did. Tight in my booty/hips area and then a bit baggier elsewhere. Super comfy pants and decent quality for price! I'm 5'1 and these are a bit long on me, but not terribly so.

I usually would wear a 12 in modern women’s pants sizes because everything has some stretch to it. Keep in mind these pants do not stretch at all. I am 5’1”, 176 lbs with the weight in the lower half and I am pretty much at capacity for the seat/inseam (not that the seams are stressed, more that the pants will start to crease strangely in the front - if I could do the splits, I’d be able to do them easily and without an incident). I don’t plan to exchange because they’d be too long and the legs look good. I ordered black and they are thin but not transparent (you won’t see the color of your underwear). Like others have said, weight in the pockets (e.g. my iPhone 12 mini) will pull them down. Overall, I’d recommend giving them a shot.

I utilized their sizing guide and ordered a size 28 just as I do and most shorts, I definitely think somethings wrong. I’m a 5 ft 6” woman who wears a size 8 in general, pretty average, but this is the biggest and weirdest pair of shorts I’ve ever received! I clearly can’t keep these and yes, they’re going back!! You could fit 2 of my body’s in this item.

I volunteered to work 4 days at a PGA event at an LA course and although I wear a lot of black pants, the long ones were all starting to get worn. I went into a last minute panic and searched online for stock at local stores, which proved fruitless. Amazon to the rescue. These arrived in 2 days with my Prime and fit perfectly. I wore for 2 days, washed and wore for 2 days again, and now they are my daily go-to casual pants. (Signaling the direction of a tee shot in the photo. You never see the hundreds of volunteers behind the scenes on TV.). PS: I am 5’7” and the length of the black was perfect with trainers.

I waited weeks for this to arrive and was super excited b/c these a great fitting jeans and the price was awesome and then.... these royal chakra blue jeans have the worst dye lines across the pelvis. WTH? Why do they do this? It completely ruins the look of the jeans - makes them look messy and the wearer looks fat. SO BUMMED!!! for reference tho, I'm wearing a size 10 long - I'm 170pds, 5'8.5"and the jeans fit really well - love how they hug my tummy and the long means you don't see my socks in low shoes.
I want a pair in every color. Weight 119, 5’2” ordered an X-Small and they fit perfectly.

I want to be as detailed as possible. Firstly as I write this it's more of first impressions than an actual review. I'm 5'9" and currently weigh 243lbs. I ordered these pants based off of Amazon's recommendations in size 18. These pants just fit. And I don't mean that in a bad way. They are not too big or too tight anywhere. They just fit me. Lol. I got some junk in the trunk. I struggle with chub rub and wide calves. Again nothing feels constrained. The material has that rough texture like normal jeans. It's made with 3% spandex, which surprisingly gives a lot of stretch overall to the pants. My usual go to pair of high waisted black jeans have been Old Navy's Rockstar super skinny high rise 24/7 sculpt pants in size 14 regular. These pants are a pretty close match. Those jeans have been my everything. I work all day in those pants and live in those pants. And I can't get them anymore. That's how I ended up here trying these pants. I could probably size down to a 16 for a more fitted pair. But I'm not going to return these ones. They are high rise for sure. If you need pants to work in like me these will do. I can bend/squat down in these and not fear I'm revealing my backside. I did see a review before ordering these about the back pockets being more outward/on the side. And they might be further outward than most jeans. But that's okay with me. I carry my phone in my back pocket so having the pockets more outward prevents me from crushing my phone. Overall, I'm happy with the purchase and the first impressions. I don't know how well they will hold up with lots of use. I go through jeans and shoes frequently. I do a lot walking/bending/squating etc at work. And maintain an active lifestyle outside of work too. So these pants will get a lot of work out of them. If anything major happens I will update this review. Hope this helps.

I want to love these. They are comfortable, cute and flattering. I'm 5'1 and the length works, which is a huge bonus for me. I didn't see it in the item picture so I thought these would be safe....I was wrong. Sadly have to return these.

I wanted a cute pair of crop jeans & I'm so excited about these! They fit PERFECTLY. They feel slightly stretchy and comfy. Exactly as pictured and fit in my usual size. For reference, I'm 5'4, 135lbs and wearing a size 6 in black.

I wanted a loose fit and extra length (I’m 5’10”) so I went up 2 sizes. It swallows me so I wish I had ordered my normal size or one size up instead. However, it is SO nice and very comfortable. I love the length on the pants and the wide-leg style. I’ll probably size down and order another color!

I wanted a pair of casual pants with pockets to hold my phone. The fit is good but an inch or so too long on me (5’ 4”). There is a drawstring to cinch the waist but I did not know there were drawstrings around the bottom of the pants too. If you cinch the legs, the loop of stretch cord is left hanging out and looks unsightly. My solution was to tuck the loop up under the pants leg and that kept it out of sight. There is one cargo pocket on the right leg and regular pockets at the top. There are no pockets on the back of the pants. I would recommend these pants if you are looking for lightweight, casual pants with storage.

I wanted chunky sweatpants to wear with crop tops and platform tennis shoes. I read the reviews on these and decided to get the L, I am 5’4” and 135lbs with an hourglass figure. These fit great everywhere, still loose and chunky casual looks great for what I wanted them for. I will be buying in other colors.

I wanted chunky sweatpants to wear with crop tops and platform tennis shoes. I read the reviews on these and decided to get the L, I am 5’4” and 135lbs with an hourglass figure. These fit great everywhere, still loose and chunky casual looks great for what I wanted them for. I will be buying in other colors.

I wanted so badly to love these. I purchased a size small, and for reference I typically wear a size 25-26 in jeans (almost all of my jeans are Levi’s). The stretch was stretchier than all of the yoga pants that I own. I am 5 foot 5.5 inches tall and even without the little boots I had on I felt they were just a little too short for my liking. I wanted to be able to wear them with boots but can’t due to the length. I would also say these are more of a mid-rise jean. The color is perfect, and I loved the detailing but they just did not work for me so I will be returning.

I wanted some black barrel jeans without a high price. I’m pleased with these. They are very comfortable and look pretty good. I’m tallish (5’8”) so I wish they were about an inch longer, but they are good for this early fall time of year . I like the extra high rise and the big utility pockets on the front. The fading looks a little wacky on the butt but it’s not very noticeable. The denim is very lightweight but not stretchy at all. And I appreciated that there was no strange odor. I ordered my normal size, 8, and they fit perfectly on my waist. They are loose in the hip and leg as intended. I’ll get a lot of wear out if these! Hopefully they will wash well.

I wanted some colored pants for work that were stretchy but not too thin. I’m 5’5, 145 lb. I usually wear a 6 or 8, but I decided to take a risk and order a 9. They fit surprisingly great and very comfy. They are stretchy and still have a little room for if they shrink a little after washing.

I wanted some cute pants to wear on my Italy honeymoon. These pants were a perfect find! I am 5 feet tall so I got the shirt size. They were a great length for someone my size. They are SO comfortable and such nice quality. I walked around in these for 15 hours and was so comfortable all day! They looked so cute and are easy to style an outfit with. I want to buy them in more colors!

I wanted these jeans for Fall 2023! I loved the fit and comfort! I’m 5’6 140lbs, ordered a Small! I wore this to a NFL game! 5 ⭐️ ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I wanted these to be amazing and they are! I am 5’9” and they hit at just the right length. Comfy and lite weight… and for real they have pockets!!!! If they make it through a kindergarten work day I may buy more!!!

I wanted these to be loose and baggy... so I got a large. Waist fits great since has elastic....and length is just right for my height. I'm 5'4" and right at 160lb. If you want baggy maybe go up a size. They feel great on too

I ordered the size 7 so not sure if I need a smaller size since stretched soooooo much. For reference I’m 5’4” tall and weigh 148lbs. I love the design and how great it makes my curves look but I’m concerned it will continue to stretch. I will try to wash them and see what happens.

I wanted to like these but a few things ... VERY VERY Thin material. I got the black so not huge issue and these are noted as "thin" material but still on the effy side. Definitely would not order a lighter color in thin. They are very high waisted which I Love ! But with that said the zipper is almost too high, should have been sewn lower. The waist is great and very comfortable but looks like your crotch is at your stomach. I don't hate them but not sure they look great for my slim/athletic body type. I got black, xs, thin My measurements are: 5'3 122 pounds 25" waist

I wanted to like this product so bad. But I had to return it since it didn’t fit as I had hoped. I am a 26” waist and 36.5” hips with a 26.5” inseam (I’m 5’2”). The waist was too large, and the length was too long. I was hoping the pants would hit somewhere below my ankle, but they bunched at the bottom. It fit my hips just fine and the material feels good for the price, unfortunately it just didn’t fit in the other areas.

I wanted to love these and I do! Very comfortable and flattering. No button or zipper, pull on style. Good length for short or petite- I'm 5'0 and they're just right. I ordered my true size medium and I'm 135 pounds. Will be ordering in more colors

I wanted to love these because the denim color was perfect, and the fleece inside felt super-soft. Unfortunately, although these weren't tight in the legs, they had trouble accommodating my butt. I had the dreaded giant gap in the back of the waist band which is very uncomfortable. In the front, these didn't even come up to my belly button even though they do on the model. The waist was just very weird for this size (XXL). You might be able to reign in the waist with a belt to gather up the extra fabric and eliminate the gap in the back. If you're tall, be aware that these will be high-waters on you. I'm 5'8" and would not be able to wear these without looking silly. These have a real zipper and button in case you were curious, they aren't a pull-on pant. These were a "no" for me based on how they fit my body, but construction-wise they are high quality. I didn't see any loose threads, crooked stitching, or anything else. If you wear a smaller size and are 5'6" or shorter, these might work better for you.
I wanted to love these but they’re too big on me. Overall the pants are great I just wish they came in a smaller size. I’m 5 3 and approx 110 lbs

I wanted to love these jeans. Great quality and nice looking. Unfortunately, the small was still a bit bulky on me in the hips (I have a pretty boyish figure) and they were way too long. I am 5’3”, average inseam length for my height, and 110 pounds. I am still giving them 4 stars because they are nice jeans and if you are taller and more full in the hips than me they will be really nice. I am returning but I would still recommend this brand to different body shapes and sizes.

I wanted to love these so badly! They are cute, stretching, and made from a comfortable material. The fabric has great detail. Unfortunately, they are waaaay short. Please make 34in inseam for the tall ladies! If you are shorter like 5’3” I highly recommend these. I typically where a size small, they are true to size, just SHORT. You will look ridiculous in these if you are tall.

My biggest struggle is finding belts that fit my waist and hips, that aren’t children’s belts. This was perfect for me! I am 4’11” and weigh 92lbs, for size reference.
I was a little skeptical but they exceeded my expectations. I will be definitely purchasing other colors. I'm 5'5, 175 pounds and the large fit great.

I was a little skeptical when ordering but I am obsessed to say the least!!! It fits like a glove and is not too tight. It hugs in the right places, stretchy, and so flattering. I am 5’7 and it was the perfect length. Not too short and not too long! I cannot recommend this dress enough!!

I was A little stepped cool at first because the reviews were either good or bad but these are the best pair of jeans I’ve ever bought. I’m 5”11 so it’s hard to find decent length jeans, Great purchase, will definitely buy another pair. I purchase a medium!

I was a little unsure when I ordered these pants, but I'm so glad I gave them a shot. For context, I am 5'2 and plus size. I always have problems ordering clothes that make me feel good. These pants made me feel cute from the get go. They are so comfortable, soft and very lightweight. The elastic around the band doesn't roll down and you can wear them with or without the belt. For someone of my height they do fit a little different than the picture, but nothing a good altering job can't fix. The fabric is hight quality and very forgiving. I highly recommend these pants.

I was a little worried about them fitting me. I’ve lost weight n I wasn’t sure of what size jeans I wore. I love the Levi signature jeans. I was actually impressed with how much I like these! I’m 5’5 about 130 for reference and I got a size 6. They fit great and on the comfier/looser side, which is what I wanted. Docked one star because I think the photos make them look more like structured/stiffer jeans but the material is softer, which isn’t bad and prob why they’re so comfy. Definitely recommend!
I was afraid of the bad revew! but I was surprised! I loved them! I'm 5.4 and weigh 120lb for your reference.

I was apprehensive about getting these pants because I thought they might not be flattering on me, but YEOOOOO I wear these boys like TWICE A WEEK IM IN LOVE. They're cute asf with a crop top or oversized sweater tucked in!!! And theyre so COMFORTABLE. The waist is completely elastic like pajama pants, but still has a button and zipper to look like jeans. I usually wear them with a belt to sinch in my waist a little more, but they're cute without one too! The pockets are DEEP too I can actually fit my phone in em its wild. I get compliments literally every single time I wear them! The only thing I could say is if you're on the taller side like me (5'10/11) the leg holes kind of ride up if you sit with your legs crossed or bend over. I think I got a 3xl just because I was scared they were Asian sizes and I wear a size 14/16 jeans so u know how it is lol. They fit GREAT but I could have comfortably gone down to a 2x or maybe even 1x. They really really feel like you're just wearing pajamas I love it

I was apprehensive about these but glad I purchased. This is more of a stretchy Jean material. I am 5’4” and 130 lbs with thicker thighs and 34DD and the medium fits perfect. They hit just a little below my ankles. No problems with adjusting the straps. I did have to tighten them quite a bit so the crotch wouldn’t sag.

I was back and forth with seller about the appropriate size for me, I kept changing from L to XL, both were inaccurate reviews and seller. Listen when I say, there is no way a person weighing 200 lbs plus can fit into a XL., you won’t be able to breath or button up the jeans. I know because I used my own common scene and ordered the size I knew would fit at my size. 190lbs and went with the XL and the fit was perfect. The seller indicated I get a size 3X….REALLY…never in my entire life wore nothing higher than a XL. The reviews are insane as we’ll. All I would say if you want a looser fit, size up, other then that use my guide, it’s more then most. They are stretch and if your over 200 lbs don’t buy no XL you will be sending them back for a larger size. 170-180lbs Large. Shipping was guaranteed sooner too, that didn’t happen, wasn’t too long though. Very nice pair of jeans overall. Listen to your body, if you need to squeeze into any pair of jeans then that’s on you.

I was blown away by the quality and feel of these pants right out of the package. They have a good weight to them and feel amazing on. They fit true to size. I also really appreciate the inseam options, as well as the pockets! I chose a 31" inseam, size large.

I was curious how this cut of jean would fit me but wanted to give it a try. I actually loved it. The jeans are well made and run pretty close to size. For reference I am 5' 2" and 115lbs and usually wear a size 4. These run from small to x-large. I ordered the small and there was still a little room but it is supposed to be a relaxed fit. They are a good weight but not a heavy jean. They are a cropped fit and being a shorty it still ended up being slightly cropped so if you are a taller girlie it will crop even higher on your leg. They are very comfortable and have a slight stretch to them as well. All in all I am very happy with these pants.

I was curious how this cut of jean would fit me but wanted to give it a try. I actually loved it. The jeans are well made and run pretty close to size. I was drawn to these jeans because it said they were mid-rise (and on sale). I can’t do high waisted jeans and I have struggled to find mid-rise flares at a reasonable price. After reading the reviews I wasn’t sure if I would like them. Many sizes were sold out because they were on sale. I ordered an 8 regular in a blue wash and an 8 short in a grey wash. As you can see from the pictures, the regular comes up to my belly button. I’m only 5’ 3.5” and weigh about 135 but still. I was disappointed. They were definitely long, but I thought maybe with a heel I could get away with it. Then I tried on the short. They didn’t come up as high (although still a little higher than I wished). And the length was perfect. Some people said their size was a little loose. These are definitely not loose on me. I’m actually hoping they might loosen up a bit after I wear them. I’m returning the 8 regular and plan to keep the 8 short. I haven’t worn them other than to try on so I can’t yet speak for how they will hold their shape after all day. They do have some stretch to them; enough to make them conformable and not stiff.

I was excited when the jeans came. I tried them on right away. But the have to be returned because they fit big on me. I do have a gut, hip dips and normal size butt. These jeans gapped on the sides, made my butt look flat and the stretch was good but not a good look on me. I ordered a 4x because of the reviews. So I'm sad to have return it, but glad I can order a smaller size. I'm a 5"7' weighing 225.

I was expecting a thinner material on these pants. I was pleasantly surprised these were as thick as they were, which means they aren't see through! I'm 5'3" and they brush the tops of my feet as long as I have them pulled up good. The slit is pretty high, but not up to your knee high. The fit is good. They fit just right in the hips and waist. I am not really a fan of the way they look on my body style. I didn't deduct stars for that. It's nothing against the pants. They are a good quality pair of pants, I just feel like this big of a flare is not suited to my body type after seeing it in the mirror.

I was expecting these pants to be more yellow than orange, but they’re entirely orange. They’re very cute if you want orange pants, though. I’m 5’4, size small and they were a bit long. However, they did fit well around my butt so if I would order an xs, they would probably be right around my butt. Disappointed, will have to order another color in the hopes that it’s accurate this time.

I was expecting to not like this product because I thought the color was gonna be different and the length might not work because Im on 5'1". However this has become my favorite pants to wear when I have events to go to for college that involves professional attire. I absolutely love them

I was extremely hesitant to purchase these pants online because I have trouble finding things that fit me just right. These pants can be dressed up or down and stretch and feel as comfortable as leggings. For reference, I’m 5’4” & 254lbs

I was Extremely reluctant about this purchase!! I waited a day or two before even trying them on but they are a keeper. They feel is good. I would have preferred no pockets on the back but they are okay little low but we can't have it All. I am 5'6" around 130lbs I know I will enjoy these haven't owned a pair of jeans in year, because they would never stay up. These will! Thank Lee Riders!

I was eyeing for this jeans in awhile. Then I finally get it for Christmas. Fit was not what I expected! Description say fitted through hip and thigh but it was loose everywhere. The look in the pictures in the model wasn’t the same jeans but closer. For preference I’m 5’1, 25 in waist and 115 lbs. Love the wash and material of this jeans but sadly I have to return it.

I was hesitant at first about purchasing these, but glad I did! Ordering in the black next…love that they don’t drag the ground and still gives me the look I want to achieve without wearing heels. I’m 177lb, 5’5’ish… size 10. I ordered a large bc I have thick thighs and hips.

I was hesitant to buy since there weren’t many reviews but this skort is SO cute and so comfortable! I ordered a size up (L) because I was between, it’s a little roomy, I probably could have gone a size down and ordered my usual size (M). Either would’ve been fine. I’m 5’5” and 145-150lbs for reference. It’s really good quality, would buy again in my colors. Ignore my horribly dusty mirror 😂

I was hesitant to buy these because I’m so small (I’m 5.0 and 107lbs rn at 13 weeks PPW was 100 I ordered a XS for reference)I usually wear size 1-3 in jeans but obviously I can’t put the buttons together now so this is the next best thing! I like my jeans to have no lose spots anywhere! These are great!! So much better than I thought and so comfortable!! Really glad I got these!

I was hesitant to get these based on previous reviews, but I really like them! The blue grey color is nice. For reference I’m 5’4, 135lbs and got a medium. They are slightly baggy in some areas and a little long but not quite dragging on the floor. I don’t like the placement of the zipper and clasp in the back as it is hard to reach. Overall really comfy and stretchy

I was hesitant to purchase jeans online because I wasn't sure what I would do if they didn't fit. It's one thing to purchase another pair of jeans when you already have a pair and you know your size. It's completely different to purchase a pair blind without having a reference point. So, I looked at the reviews and I saw where a woman who is 5'3" says they fit her well. She said they fit "perfect". I'm 5'2' so I was SOLD because of her review. I mean, the jeans look great on the model, but I wasn't sure they'd look or feel great on me, especially since I'm short. Well, blow me over with a feather! i am so excited I pulled the trigger. The color is beautiful. They're a deep, dark blue. The length is perfect. Like I said, I'm an inch shorter than the other woman and that 1 inch does not make them go from the perfect length to too long. They fit well in the stomach. I have a stomach. I birthed two children and I'm fat. Unless I pay a doctor in Mexico to fix this, that stomach and I will be best friends until I die. They are not too tight. They stretch to accommodate my belly well. I usually wear a 12 which fit my belly well, but are too big in the legs. They sag, and I'm not a 20 year old boy who sags on purpose. i just don't have enough going on to fill out the pants. i chose a 10. It was available and I'm losing weight by eating keto. Although I've lost 6 or 7 pounds and these fit GREAT, they would fit better if I lost another 5 pounds. I don't have a great shaped lower (or upper) body and they're not magic, but they look good and feel good. I don't know about sewing, but whatever "darts" they added to enhance my shape did a pretty decent job.

I was hesitant to purchase these pants based on mixed opinions in posted reviews and overall score. Being a Latina with curves and big thighs, it’s sometimes challenging to find the right fit. For context I wear size 10 or 12 depending on the style, material, cut, etc… I bought these in a 12 to ensure they weren’t too fitted! The material is great quality, very soft and flowy, they are roomy in the thighs, fabric not overly thin so we’re not transparent as you can see in the pics (I zoomed in on all so you can really see the details), and the cut fit very pretty. The waist has some elasticity in the back and the zipper is in the side. I’m 5’5 and length was perfect. I can wear with flats, kitten or regular 3”heels without a problem. Finally, classy pants that fit right! I plan on getting them in more colors.
I was hesitant with all of the rips, but they are so cute! They have a nice stretch to them and the length is perfect. I'm 5'7, 146lbs. Very satisfied with these.

I was honestly shocked at how much I love these pants! This is day 2 wear and the stretch hasn't made the jeans stretch out too much to become saggy like most do. Got a small bc I'm 5'6" and 113lbs have hips but suffer from noassatall heheh... These are the perfect fit if you're built like me! So far so good.

I was honestly shocked that these arrived in as good of condition and were absolutely wearable! I am 4'11" approximately 130 lb and I bought a size medium and they fit perfectly. I did have to put on a decent size heel but with the heel I didn't walk on them and they didn't drag the ground at all. The inside lining is super comfy too! The only reason I can't give these five stars is because I wanted them a little bit more elasticy around the waist to give a little more suck in power and because the sequins did rub a little and get caught on each other where my thighs rub together on the inside. I think the rubbing is a fix that you could probably craft with some sealant or maybe fabric adhesive. I got compliments on these all night long and I could have stayed in them for hours! I would say these are a must purchase for any party!!

I was honestly shocked. Amazon suggested I order 30", which I did. I fully expected to have to return them because I have a hard time finding jeans that fit me (I ordered on a lark). But the fit was PERFECT. I'm 5'6", 140 lbs, 33" waist, slim build... and these jeans are an absolute perfect fit. They're super comfortable. And they look amazing.

I was hoping for pants that were like thicker faux leather and these were not what I expected. They were thinner and felt like leggings, but with back pockets. Despite the fact that they weren’t what I expected, they fit perfectly and felt amazing while on. They were accidentally thrown in with the regular wash and dry cycles and it didn’t ruin them at all. I don’t normally wash and dry new clothes this way, but was very pleased that they were not shrink or get damaged. For reference, I am 5’4”, 140lbs and the large fit well. I feel like a medium might fit well, also because the stretch is great.
I was hoping the pants would be long, but it’s practically at ankle length when worn on the waist (not tall/long legged girl friendly). I’m 5’8” by the way….planning to return.

I was impressed with this belt based on the price I paid. It is entitled a “leather belt” but down further in the description it states “faux leather” so truly not leather but I wasn’t expecting it to be for $15.00. Still it’s false advertising, hence my 4 stars. Besides that the rest is all positive for the belt I paid for. I’m a 37” waist & went with a large & it wasn’t too large for me. There are 6 holes to the belt & I use hole #5 to buckle it. The material is nice & smooth. There isn’t a flaw to it. It’s 1” wide & the buckle is 1-1/2” wide. The buckle is a nice silver which is shiny but not too shiny. It does come with instructions-per my pictures- as well as a little gadget to use in case the belt is too long. The gadget allows you to unscrew the buckle & cut the belt to shorten it. I’d say the sizing they provide is accurate though. I could’ve gone with a medium. Overall a great belt to wear with jeans or dress pants. A nice color black. I’m happy with this belt, it fits comfortably & I feel it was well worth what I paid. I definitely recommend it.

I was injured in a car accident and gained quite a bit of weight. With that being said, I need to order new pants that would fit my new sizes. I saw these and remembered I had similar pants of a smaller size. I’m a fan of sticking to what I know. I am 5’6” tall. My waist is 31 inches and my hip is 44 inches. According to the size chart, I needed a large. The pants fit true to size. The pants themselves feel like really good quality. They’re lightweight but the material is still heavy. It’s not flimsy or see-through. These pants feel super durable. They’re comfortable yet still give a very professional appearance due to the style and design. Most people hate the scrunchie waist but I love it because it gives room for me to lose weight without having to have the pants tailored. The length of the pants is regular length, not long or short. My one complaint is the buttons. They’re hideous. That’s not a major issue for me because I can just change them.

I was kind of skeptical about buying these at first but I’m so happy I did!! I am 5’6 and about 220lbs and the XL fit perfect!! They are super comfy and are stretchy! The length is perfect with my boots on and I cannot wait to wear them out!! 😍😍

I was led to this belt by an influencer and absolutely love it! The color of the buckle is more of a gold brass finish which I liked - not too orange gold that looked cheap. I’ve been looking for a reversible belt that actually got my waist! I’m 5’0 , 98 pounds with a 25-26 waist. I love most is I can hide the rest of the belt behind the belt. The quality is good and so is the color Don’t wait just buy it! I already wore it twice this week!

I was leery about these after reading reviews. But I'm so glad I got them! They do feel like actual jeans, not some weird material. Granted, not super thick, but I hate thick denim. They are stretchy, and on the softer side. Not the softest jeans I've ever had, but definitely better than most! I am 5'6" and about 125 lbs. got a M, and they are a great length and fit well in the waist. I was worried they'd be too short, but they are perfect. Yes, I trimmed some of the longer freys, but a) it was super easy and b) that is 100% preference and that would not deter me from buying another pair. I got tons of compliments the first time I wore them and everyone was asking where I got them. Would absolutely buy again in a heartbeat!

I was looking for a comfortable and well-cut executive pants... definitely these are the ideal ones for me, I am 5'5" and 138lb, size 4 and these pants fit as expected (bought size 4), they have double fabric at the waist so that they do not shrink and looks flawless, another thing is that they dónt have the strings for a belt and that make them look very clean, the perfect executive pants, I already bought a khaki and will get them ALL!

I was looking for a comfy skort I could wear in the summer and this delivered! I was prepared to be underwhelmed because it had no reviews when I ordered it lol. It definitely exceeded expectations! I'm 5'5, 122lbs and usually around 25in for bottoms. The sizing chart was very accurate and the small fits well! I probably could have gone with an XS for a more snug fit, but I wanted a little room for a more relaxed fit. This is a very comfortable, slightly oversized feel, like a boyfriend jean. The pockets are very deep and the material is soft. Went in the washer and dryer with no problems. Would highly recommend!

I was looking for a cute babydoll dress but didn’t want to pay the high price from some of the boutiques. This is a total must. I’m 5’5 length was good. I got a medium probably could of done a small. Planning on ordering other colors.

I was looking for a pair of inexpensive high waisted black shorts for an outfit and found these. Happily surprised. I’m 5’8 203 pounds , I ordered a large and they fit nice and snug. I could’ve went up for a slightly looser fit .. but why?! I took a star off - no belt loops however they really aren’t necessary

I was looking for a pair of Mom jeans and found these. I really loved the color, and probably would have liked the fit, but they are SO SMALL! I am 4’11, 115 lbs, and wear a size 4 in most pants. I could hardly get them over my butt and there was no way these babies were zipping or buttoning! The photos above are as much as I could get them on. Also, they were miles too long for me. If you are tall and very thin, these would probably work, but I would have had to size up one, if not two sizes and I never have to do that with 27’s (size 4) in other pants. I decided not to exchange to a different size because of how long they were and there was no “short” option. Sad they didn’t work out!

I was looking for a pair of wide leg dress pants. I wasn’t expecting to buy yoga pants. I work in corporate. I have worn these twice so far and nobody has noticed. They are so comfortable! They also do not wrinkle easy. I left them crumpled up on the floor in my room, and wore them again with no wrinkles. For reference, I am 5’7” I weigh 164 pounds size 10 jeans. I got the size large with the 31 inch inseam and they fit perfect! I will definitely be ordering another color. The only thing I wish they didn’t have is in the butt it comes down slightly in a V shape which I feel I need to hide with my sweater. I feel like that’s the only thing that really gives it away that they are yoga pants. Other than that I have no complaints about these pants!!

I was looking for a pant that is similar to the anthro Colette pant without the $128 price tag!! IM IN LOVE!! buttery soft, most most comfortable pants you will ever put on. Already ordered another color! I’m 5’3 and am wearing a 28! True to size!

I was looking for a wide-legged pant to go with my top. I purchased these in Orange and Red in sizes L, XL and XXL. I ended up going with the Orange pants in XL. At the time, I was about 210 lbs and I am 5'5".These are nice pants. They are a bit thin, so when I wore them, I put on a boy short underneath to smooth out the look. The crotch area is a bit high for my taste. So, even though they fit great, the crotch area can look a bit tight, giving the perception that they are too small, which was not the case. With a slight heel, I was great to go without having to hem them.I felt the Orange color 'popped' better over the Red, but both are nice colors.

I was looking for casual pants to wear for quick errands and light walks. These pants are great for that. The material is yoga/ workout ish type. This pants not meant for winter or to keep you warm. I normally wear size 6, 26/27 and the Small is a good fit without being too tight. I am 5’7” and the length hits right at the ankle.

I was looking for fleece-lined leggings for when I move to the mountains this winter, and I’ll be spending a ton of time outdoors through my work, but also working in a very casual-dress office environment as well. I’ve lived in the area before, and I needed to stock up on pieces I can layer. I seriously just ordered three more pairs of these leggings, because they’re on sale, and the cabin I’ll be living in has access to a washer/dryer, but our buildings operate on solar power, and to conserve our energy I’ll likely drive to the laundromat every few weeks, and these are the most comfortable, attractive, versatile leggings I own. I can layer them with my other thermal tights/leggings for extra warmth if needed in the office, or layer them under ski-pants or thicker hiking pants outside. Also, I just wore them to lunch with a friend today, they look fantastic, so I just wore them with a long-sleeved more dressy top and they were great on their own. I am 5’4” and 128-130 lbs, and curvy hourglass shape, more curvy on the top though. My regular bottom half measurements are included in the photos I’ve attached. The mediums fit very well, even though most of my leggings are smalls, I wanted something looser and able to layer over another pair of fleece leggings for cold days - and these leggings are soft and so stretchy that I can comfortably wear them alone or layer below with another thin thermal layer. I love that they’re lined leggings, but especially since I sized up a little, they aren’t inappropriately clingy. The waistband is soft, stretchy, and not constricting at all. The waistband on the medium is a little loose on me, but not in a way that they’re baggy or would fall down, or that anyone would notice. Im curled up on the couch writing this right now, and regardless of how I sit or lay down, they’re comfortable and flexible. The leggings are opaque and not sheer at all. They’ll provide a great “blue jean” looking cover that I can wear my super stretchy fleece lined leggings under if needed. I just bought another pair of the blue, and two pairs of the black. Thank you to the poster that mentioned piling. Because of it, I washed these the same way I wash my more traditional looking fleece lined leggings - in mesh laundry bags on a cold delicate cycle and then hang to dry. I’ll update my review if there’s any issue with piling with this laundry routine, but I haven’t had any yet.

I was looking for some comfy pants to wear during spring and summer. I’m in love with these pants, like the rest of the reviewers. I’m two months post partum, 5’9 and 220lbs. While the reviews said there was lots of stretch, I was hesitant to order my true size (XL). I ordered a 2x and it was too big. I can take them off without unbuttoning the pants! I ordered a white in 1x and fushia in xl. The xl definitely fits and is super comfortable, but as the pictures show, there is more bunching in the legs so I think the 1xl fits a little better out of the dried but the xl is better at the end of the day because it doesn’t stretch out as much. I washed the pants according to the directions and I did not notice shrinking. My pink pants did not bleed either. The white pants are see through so wear a long shirt and light underwear. Can’t go wrong with this price or these colors!

I was nervous about buying jeans online because it's hard to find ones that fit my body type; smaller waist, bigger butt. I'd always have trouble with gapping in the back. These jeans arrived today and I eagerly tried them on. They fit like a glove! No gapping! Super stretchy and comfortable despite me being bloated today. I'm so happy bell bottoms are back in fashion. I haven't had a pair since I was in elementary school lol! For reference I'm 5ft 9in and about 150lbs. I got the large due to other reviews saying they run small. Listen to that advice! If I followed the size chart and got the recommended medium they would definitely be too small! Also the length!! Omg it's perfect! Highly recommend!

I was nervous about buying these but I’m so glad I got them! I’m 5’0, 125-130lbs. These fit me securely but not too tight! They hug my hips and they are a great length. I would love to purchase a few pair of pants if this brand sells any 🥹😂

I was nervous about buying these but I’m so glad I got them! I’m 5’0, 125-130lbs. These fit me securely but not too tight! They hug my hips and they are a great length. I would love to purchase a few pair of pants if this brand sells any 🥹😂

I was nervous about them not fitting in time for the bachelorette party I was attending, but they fit perfectly! They seem to be true to size. I’m 5’9” and ordered a size 12! I normally wear an XL in pants. I really like these pants and definitely will order more.

I was nervous about these because I’m 5’7 and wanted to wear heels with them but it worked out! I wish they were just a couple inches longer for me but I’m sure everyone else will appreciate the length. They were super comfortable all night and nice and light material. I’m going to definitely order in more colors!

I was nervous about these being too long and small but I am pleased!! They fit nicely with a comfortable stretchy material. The length is great with platform sandals or a heel (I’m 5’3”). They come over the muffin top right at the bottom of my belly button. The waist is a little loose but I’m thicker below waist so that’s normal for me. All in all I LOVE these pants!

I was nervous about this, as I’ve never worn a romper, always afraid I couldn’t pull it off with my belly and thick thighs and booty. I don’t think that anymore!!!!! This fits like a dream, has great coverage of my belly bc of the way it lays, and honestly makes my butt look pretty amazing. Toot toot lol. The material is not super thick, but it’s thick enough that it doesn’t show every (or any for that matter!) cellulite ripples. I’m 5’2 but have on 2.5in heels in the photo, 190lbs, and got a xl for reference. If you’re like me and have though about buying a romper but haven’t yet but the bullet….THIS IS YOUR SIGN!
I was nervous that this skirt was going to be too small but it fit perfectly. I’m a 5/6 in jeans, 5’5 and 147-152 lbs.

I was nervous to purchase these because I’ve gained a lot of weight since having a baby and covid so I had no idea about size, but I am 5’7” and 160 pounds, the medium was PERFECT. These pants are so stretchy and comfortable, I am in LOVE. For the price, you can’t go wrong! I’m so happy I stumbled across these, I’m definitely going to be purchasing one in every color! I haven’t washed them yet, but I will update my review if anything goes awry!

I was not a belt girl until I got this one lol. I love the way it looks and the gold color has a nice shine to it. I’m 5’5 and I got the smallest size and fits me well! Only downside is that you can feel that the quality is pretty bad (however for the price what can you expect?) but other than that good!

I was not expecting such a great fit -- perfect, really -- of these on me. I'm 5'5", about 142lbs, typically size 4-6 in most major brands, and the size 6 fits perfectly. No waist gap, no uncomfortable snugness anywhere, hits right at my waist; even the length works for me. The wide legs are pretty wide, bordering on baggy; I think I'm going to get them tailored slightly so they're less palazzo-like and drape more similarly to Levi's Ribcage Wide Leg (which I love the width of the legs, but Levi's just generally do not fit me well in the waist, butt, and thigh areas). These have a bit of stretch as well. I love them. I got them in another color, and have another on the way -- they're that great!
